name: Virginia Elections Update
subject: What the heck is going on here?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Virginia might flip. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGG0VzOCw_wC4DwV0ALL4_51OI1lGHcZd5QKzFVH14Jfm-wvp1GS-q1ShY_oWxJB5R1K8BiS5jZbxPiFp2oBWOYZZX-uVoVUmBapiFdNk_IiTPdwOIUNakMIXzs3lkr-Y_EIQhGCURYgqmJ41LO8P759lgJd4CHdfdh3rZ3mCIrrq5hRxFjVRHc3SSwQId4WS5Pm7cG-dmMjpbiw69nA1Lha9T9vJQ8LtzcqiugjN4d-PVqAlcezejwzm5uH3pH7LS1Z6aQDrI2EcN2BIMsjg2_fxPDp7A08TDp7xm36DOehTkUqlXqW90Lei3CRDJ3nYJA/3fv/-O7_JcvYSJyw0jnGraxMIg/h0/GYUIPQvXOrIYTxKERoZccfJS-BB9Bi0pR73eCXfcNTY)
Derek, we can’t believe this is happening. Trumpism is headed for a comeback in Virginia. Right now, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is **_LEADING_** in some polls. Not only that, but national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to **_out-organize_** Democrats, and **_Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

What’s happening?!

Democrats in Virginia aren’t waking up to how close this election is going to be. If things continue to go the way they’re going right now, Trumpism is going to sweep across Virginia, and we can kiss blue Virginia goodbye.

**[With one month to go until Election Day and every day Virginia voters heading to the polls, we need to turn things around --_fast_. Will you pitch in, right now, to help us turn out voters and elect Democrats up and down the ticket?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGG0VzOCw_wC4DwV0ALL4_51tdQu6me11wpeSkVLpbYCfj9Oebg-jeBp6h2iDrDWNgVqmQXvQjb0D8lbhD1zaTxZiYEBvxUpUP3s24sVfXDZ9Xv3YpzDh-auowz89WVC9JRjiQoOVZH2wA8n0Bb_2Vjzb55U-osHju9Er3Rk-a1Q8mi-H2j6J8XFit_ivm7U9T6f7c6ZnrBGvwU5ModZwNGiMibHr8oVPN70dkgLYcUlXGW_mjjKOLP33ElzP5Xoah7qqwO7vHZAkg1APLWR8geJqF9t8ckyWk2GO6tFRLX0P0nMh1lH-TzdghVCKt7CM_Q/3fv/-O7_JcvYSJyw0jnGraxMIg/h1/1KNayHAZl64gbZcPYeAaCI2MD4paT1QAcAhSc4YUWl0)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGG0VzOCw_wC4DwV0ALL4_51tJ9Nzj2ktzrStsyFt09iRGTsEdXdZX_WkG0k9mKlfFZHYIaQGE1TBlh5gxP_BtKChe51LrxiTrGfde8eIBUlutVQlKjUE_m15XRm2R3OdxkfCAWMxVVkxBXTo436khUuBVtlLtXeGlMxljMj6Y6wWbRdHNM90hrKHH3n14X_PIfIDz2yuJAummvChwga84B4Q3fCiN2nEY_ExhqfRU0kmW8oJHwopdKZx1hdeC2FhOkn5hY83MurH5GzlnXkJa10pr25lzv2G3bWbQ-iYMWgbzWf_QkeQgEpGUXwi3L5wTg/3fv/-O7_JcvYSJyw0jnGraxMIg/h2/vIj1M_JzPYn0W0UCXpQt03AkyHMOdlpuTqHWfQuXvzw)

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Unbelievable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460899:6vfosG2QN:m:1:3253819041:4B60B377DBD235A410C6AF1C44687FF0:r) | |
---
Peter,

We just wrapped up our Freedom Tour across the state and it was unbelievable! Thousands of people came out to show their support and I was so humbled by their words of encouragement.

Our RV was a big help getting us from town to town, but we were on the road for a while and it used a lot of gas...and thanks to Bidenflation, it was not cheap to fill that thing up!

**Can you chip in $3 to help us cover the cost of a gallon of gas and refill our gas fund before the end of the quarter?**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460899:6vfosG2QN:m:1:3253819041:4B60B377DBD235A410C6AF1C44687FF0:r)
[**DONATE TO REFILL OUR GAS FUND**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460899:6vfosG2QN:m:1:3253819041:4B60B377DBD235A410C6AF1C44687FF0:r)
The momentum our campaign has right now is thanks to the support of so many people like you, and I am so thankful for everyone's support. Together, we can hold the line against the radical left and defend our freedom!

God bless,
Sarah Huckabee Sanders

Peter,

**" Trust the experts."**

That's what we've been hearing for MONTHS as the government shutdown our businesses, closed our schools, and shredded our Constitution.

But now the experts are revealing a very important truth about COVID-19: that it most likely started in the Wuhan labs Doctor Anthony Fauci has been sending tons of taxpayer dollars to.

Now THOSE "experts" should be ignored at all costs!

It's so clear that they don't want your TRUST and they don't care about the TRUTH. They only care about POWER.

And it's about time we put an end to this nonsense. If you agree, please stand with me today by making a quick donation:
[**STAND WITH RAND: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460946:6k_eTG2dN:m:1:3253819041:D5DE4FCFD4BD8899CBB1DE4CAE869E73:r)

**_Here's what we know now: "Wuhan scientists were planning to release enhanced airborne coronaviruses into Chinese bat populations to inoculate them against diseases that could jump to humans, leaked grant proposals dating from 2018 show." _**

This has been confirmed. _By experts._
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460945:6k_eTG2dN:m:1:3253819041:D5DE4FCFD4BD8899CBB1DE4CAE869E73:r)
We also know - _confirmed by 900+ documents_ \- that Fauci funneled millions to this very same Wuhan lab.

**The Wuhan lab is behind COVID. Fauci is behind funding for the Wuhan lab. And there's no way this nightmare is going to end as long as Fauci is in a position of power.**

_That's why he's got to go._

**_[FIRE FAUCI: $35 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58460945:6k_eTG2dN:m:1:3253819041:D5DE4FCFD4BD8899CBB1DE4CAE869E73:r)_**
_ _
And in order to get to the bottom of this crisis, we've got to stop pretending the media's favorite "experts" are infallible and start observing the real facts.
_ _

name: Roger Misso
subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Let's show Tim Ryan that we've got his back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. That's why we are proud to announce our first endorsement of a US Senate challenger in 2022: [_**Tim Ryan for Ohio**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)
One of the most important services we provide to our candidates is access to mental health resources. As Co-Chair of the Military Mental Health Caucus, Tim Ryan has been leading on meditation, mindfulness, and resilience for veterans and everyday Americans for more than a decade. As Co-Chair of the National Guard and Reserve Caucus, Tim has been a champion for the "citizen-soldiers" that step up to serve on weekends and when our nation calls upon them.

And make no mistake: _**[e](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)**_ _**[lecting Tim Ryan to the US Senate in Ohio will likely clinch a majority of integrity in the Senate!](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)**_

Tim Ryan has stepped up for us. Now it's our turn to step up for him! We want to make sure Tim has what he needs to win [_**by raising $5,000 in the next 24 hours.**_ _**Will you help us send a veterans champion to Congress by chipping in $10 or more right now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=)

For honor, for integrity, for our country - we cannot afford to lose in Ohio. [_**Let 's join together**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/xopAssyMbddttChtdWDKn19bjjcZiR78BOzJEaLZ2x8=) and send our friend Tim to the US Senate!

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/z_tbXWSfcq4PhVqtQcDCJTg8VAq80AFQ2iR219ZoiXY=/OyN-gu0GFpXpyRcjRNHfALZZdIAwk9si4iGw2AJwgaU=)_

clean_body: Peter, Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. That's why we are proud to announce our first endorsement of a US Senate challenger in 2022: =! = One of the most important services we provide to our candidates is access to mental health resources. As Co-Chair of the Military Mental Health Caucus, Tim Ryan has been leading on meditation, mindfulness, and resilience for veterans and everyday Americans for more than a decade. As Co-Chair of the National Guard and Reserve Caucus, Tim has been a champion for the "citizen-soldiers" that step up to serve on weekends and when our nation calls upon them. And make no mistake: = = Tim Ryan has stepped up for us. Now it's our turn to step up for him! We want to make sure Tim has what he needs to win = = For honor, for integrity, for our country - we cannot afford to lose in Ohio. = and send our friend Tim to the US Senate! Yours in service, Roger Roger Misso Executive Director = = To make a contribution, = "=". name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461017:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461018:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461019:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461020:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461021:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461022:J7qa6G2lN:m:1:3253819041:914267176D1AB4B93229CD259EE796DB:r) **

You were added to the system March 29, 2021.

Friend, thank you, thank you, thank you! I am so proud of this people-powered team for coming through and not only reaching but _surpassing_ our goal of 1,000 donors before our FEC fundraising deadline. Each and every contribution, from $1 to $1,000, made a difference. Thanks to you, we’re building a strong grassroots campaign to give Montana an experienced, compassionate leader who will fight for every Montanan in Congress. I know you’re probably getting a lot of political emails as we move closer to the 2022 election, and I just want to thank you for continuing to read our messages and stay engaged. You play such an important role in this race, and when we beat Zinke in 13 months, it’s going to be because of you. Now that October and the new quarter have begun, we’ve set new goals to reach as I continue to travel across Montana, meeting with folks in their communities and spreading the word about our campaign. Look out for more updates from me and my team along the way. Thanks again, from the bottom of my heart. — Laurie | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36993577/309740007/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211003thankyou_lb_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdkMzVhYi0xMDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IcMXu_tzMQubjLtNIpzI8j9MKEeNLo_KQ1WHbhnA4Mw=)

name: Jasmine
subject: Giving it my all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36994206/309742672/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIzNzJmYi0xMjI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqaxoyp4AN1XyQvtUih5PkkSeGtw5b9p0FcI8BghfDg=)

| | Peter, When I was considering running for Congress against Madison Cawthorn, I knew it was going to require my all. When we launched this campaign, we knew it needed to be built like a movement, one person at a time. And I knew that to ask for your votes, I would have to show up, listen, and learn. Unlike my extreme Republican opponent, I believe in a politics that brings people together and leaves no one behind. Building a better future for Western NC is going to take all of us. [**I’m giving this campaign my all -- and in order to keep pushing forward, I need your support. Will you chip in $25 or more today to help us defeat Cawthorn?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36994207/309742673/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211004_FR_GivingMyAll_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIzNzJmYi0xMjI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqaxoyp4AN1XyQvtUih5PkkSeGtw5b9p0FcI8BghfDg=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36994208/309742674/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211004_FR_GivingMyAll_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIzNzJmYi0xMjI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqaxoyp4AN1XyQvtUih5PkkSeGtw5b9p0FcI8BghfDg=)
---
We’ve been taking our message of hope and unity across NC-11. So far on our #OrganizingEverywhere tour, we’ve door-knocked in six out of the 17 counties, speaking directly with folks about what they want to see change within our communities.
Some of the counties I visit are very red, and skeptics will question if it’s even worth organizing there -- but we’re going to prove exactly why it matters.
Peter, I’m not the kind of elected official who only represents the people who voted for me. Instead, I’m a representative who delivers for _all_ of my constituents.
I can’t say the same for my Republican opponent. He’s already lost some of his 2020 supporters by prioritizing his extreme agenda over representing WNC.
It is time that we replace Cawthorn’s extremism with love, leadership, and hope. I knew when I announced my candidacy that it was going to require my all (and then some), but every second of this campaign so far has been worth it.
[**Will you donate $25 or more today to keep our momentum going? We appreciate your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36994209/309742675/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211004_FR_GivingMyAll_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIzNzJmYi0xMjI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqaxoyp4AN1XyQvtUih5PkkSeGtw5b9p0FcI8BghfDg=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, When I was considering running for Congress against Madison Cawthorn, I knew it was going to require my all. When we launched this campaign, we knew it needed to be built like a movement, one person at a time. And I knew that to ask for your votes, I would have to show up, listen, and learn. Unlike my extreme Republican opponent, I believe in a politics that brings people together and leaves no one behind. Building a better future for Western NC is going to take all of us. = | | | = We’ve been taking our message of hope and unity across NC-11. So far on our #OrganizingEverywhere tour, we’ve door-knocked in six out of the 17 counties, speaking directly with folks about what they want to see change within our communities. Some of the counties I visit are very red, and skeptics will question if it’s even worth organizing there -- but we’re going to prove exactly why it matters. Peter, I’m not the kind of elected official who only represents the people who voted for me. Instead, I’m a representative who delivers for all of my constituents. I can’t say the same for my Republican opponent. He’s already lost some of his 2020 supporters by prioritizing his extreme agenda over representing WNC. It is time that we replace Cawthorn’s extremism with love, leadership, and hope. I knew when I announced my candidacy that it was going to require my all (and then some), but every second of this campaign so far has been worth it. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In solidarity, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . name: Brit Bender
subject: ICYMI: Three Star Dinner 🙌
body:
https://tndp.org/threestar/ [https://tndp.org/threestar/]
Hey Peter,
In case you missed it, we've announced our annual Three Star Dinner with Congressman Conor Lamb of Pennsylvania as the keynote speaker! Congressman Lamb was first elected in a high-profile special election in 2018, when he won a district that Trump had won by nearly 20 points. He won reelection twice in 2018 and 2020 in two of the most competitive congressional races in the country.
And guess what — the Three Star Dinner is going to be IN PERSON this year! It will be held in Nashville, on October 30th at the Renaissance Hotel, and I hope you will join us. Doors open at 6 pm CT and dinner will begin at 6:30. COVID precautions will be taken, including proof of vaccination and/or a negative COVID test from within the previous 24 hours.
Click below to purchase and to find out more about pricing, tables, sponsorships, and program booklet ads.
THREE STAR DINNER [https://tndp.org/threestar/]We cannot wait to see all of our favorite Democrats at this year's Three Star Dinner, it's been too long since we've all been able to celebrate together in person. W e hope you join us Peter — it won't be the same without you!
Hope to see you on October 30th,
Brit Bender
she/her
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem] https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp] https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]
CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: U.S. Senate 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Please Open

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461080:60F0AG2PN:m:1:3253819041:B592D07575C421EBD4B35A7BC311738B:r)
---

Peter,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

**_Watch Announcement Video Below_**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461080:60F0AG2PN:m:1:3253819041:B592D07575C421EBD4B35A7BC311738B:r)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I've done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I'm asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461080:60F0AG2PN:m:1:3253819041:B592D07575C421EBD4B35A7BC311738B:r)_**

| [ENDORSE ME HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58461080:60F0AG2PN:m:1:3253819041:B592D07575C421EBD4B35A7BC311738B:r)
---

I'm looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn 't what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that's for certain! **

I'm trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn't making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it 'll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country. **

Thank you and God Bless,

We did it! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36998914/309760613/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211004thankyou_EG_all_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTZiYzc4ZS0xODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f33Xse2vj5ivZ6qestaurr_vQxR3b3cniMnx-QX9PhU=)
---
We’ve still got 13 months to go in this marathon, but I’m so proud to have you on our team. Together, we’re going to change our politics for the better and deliver real leadership back to Florida’s 15th District.
This campaign isn’t about me — it’s about _you_. I’m running to be a voice for everyone that Scott Franklin has ignored since he was elected (which, frankly, is everyone who’s not a corporation, lobbyist, or the former President), which means that we’re only going to win if we all come together. So far, we’ve done that, and I’m so appreciative of your support.
Talk soon — this journey has only just begun!
— Eddie

| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good-paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue!

name: Eric Lynn
subject: I worked for President Obama, and now I’m running for Congress.
body:
Help us keep this seat blue.

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y9AHfYOo_B0N2EURl9I3rW9g9KT8zq7SHDmEC5chdUE=/mZV7sAYFo-D6Gg9rcyuDsNPCN0re8ojs0oOq6ld3qjU=) My friend, My name is Eric Lynn, and I'm running for Congress in Florida's 13th District. I grew up in St. Pete, went to St. Pete high school. This is where I got my first job. It's where my wife, Tracy and I are raising our three kids. And after many years working as a policy advisor and public servant, I am honored to be running to stand up for our shared values. As we work to recover from the Trump era and the ongoing pandemic, I'm committed to reinvigorating our local economy, creating opportunities for all families, exploring innovative climate solutions, and protecting the pillars of democracy both at home and abroad. **This is an open seat, and we expect it to be one of the most competitive Congressional races in the country next year. But with your help, I know we can keep this seat blue and protect our House majority.** I served as a senior advisor for President Obama for eight years, and I'm proud of the important work we accomplished during my tenure. Three Secretaries of Defense looked to me for strategic advice to discourage radicalism, promote peace, and coordinate with our allies on national security issues. **From my time in the Obama-Biden administration and working in Congress, I know how to get things done in Washington. And with your support, we 're going to stop Trump Republicans, win this race, and deliver for Pinellas County in Congress.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y9AHfYOo_B0N2EURl9I3rW9g9KT8zq7SHDmEC5chdUE=/mZV7sAYFo-D6Gg9rcyuDsNPCN0re8ojs0oOq6ld3qjU=) We need leaders who can guide us through these difficult times, and I'm confident that my extensive experience will be invaluable as we fight for the values we all cherish. [**But friends, I know this race won 't be easy. National Republicans will be out in full force to flip this seat, and I'll need your help to win. Please click here to visit our website and learn more about our campaign today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y9AHfYOo_B0N2EURl9I3rW9g9KT8zq7SHDmEC5chdUE=/mZV7sAYFo-D6Gg9rcyuDsNPCN0re8ojs0oOq6ld3qjU=) I hope to be a strong advocate for the people of Pinellas County, and I look forward to working with you during this journey. Sincerely, Eric Lynn ********[Contribute](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y9AHfYOo_B0N2EURl9I3rW9g9KT8zq7SHDmEC5chdUE=/LpV_xnJ-01o2_WtWsIshQihTMDQEd6otnen1JVvjoYY=)**** ** ** Eric Lynn for Congress
PO Box 16991
St. Petersburg FL 33733 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y9AHfYOo_B0N2EURl9I3rW9g9KT8zq7SHDmEC5chdUE=/4iBFcNSSEoK1lbIFUTMcQaHoX_5bPFRXn3r5lgh64NY=). |
---|---|---

referral3 Friend — Georgia will decide who controls the U.S.
Senate next year, and there’s a clear choice in this race.

I’ve spent
my career fighting for Georgia families, workers, and businesses. I’ve
cut spending, stood in the gap against onerous regulations, and worked
with President Trump to deliver historic disaster relief.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/email-welcom

preferral3 Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to take America back —
and I’m asking for your help. Will you take the next step and donate
whatever you can?
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/email-welcom
e-series-donate-here?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signu
preferral3 DONATE NOW » I’m the only Republican who can stop Raphael
Warnock and win this race. But here’s the thing, Warnock has already
stockpiled at least $10 MILLION to keep this seat blue.

That’s why
I’m counting on your help, and believe me the stakes couldn’t be
higher:

Raphael Warnock wants to ban voter ID and make our elections
less secure. I’ll always champion fair and secure elections.

Raphael
Warnock hasn’t said a word about the crime wave sweeping our country or
the crisis at our southern border. I’ll always stand for the rule of
law, secure borders, and zero amnesty.

Raphael Warnock wants to raise
your taxes and spend trillions of dollars on regressive big government
programs that light our children’s fiscal future on fire. I’ll stand in
the gap against Washington’s overreach. We don’t need the fundamental
change championed by Raphael Warnock and his party. We need to get back
to government’s fundamental responsibility: Security — in our
communities, on our borders and of our core rights and values.

help? Donate $25, $50, or even $100 here.

Every donation will be put
to work printing campaign materials and running ads to reach Georgia
voters.

Thank you again. I’d be honored to have your support.

I’d be honored to have your support. e-series-donate-here?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=signu preferral3 Gary Black e-series-donate-here?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=signu preferral3 DONATE NOW » Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. subject: this is a test, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans ([electrepublicans
body:
Will we pass? Or fail?

| The Left is testing our resolve, Peter. Ever since Tim Scott announced his campaign for re-election to the United States Senate, Democrats from across the nation have been pouring money into South Carolina to defeat him. Don’t forget: in the 2020 Election, the Democrats raised and spent more than $120 MILLION to try to seize control of South Carolina’s US Senate Seat. This time, they plan to spend even more... clean_body: Will we pass? Or fail? | The Left is testing our resolve, Peter. Ever since Tim Scott announced his campaign for re-election to the United States Senate, Democrats from across the nation have been pouring money into South Carolina to defeat him. Don’t forget: in the 2020 Election, the Democrats raised and spent more than $120 MILLION to try to seize control of South Carolina’s US Senate Seat. This time, they plan to spend even more... The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to hold onto power. That’s why we need to be prepared to stand strong and hold the line. | | | | | Right now, the Left’s “majority” in the United States Senate comes down to a single vote. That’s why they’re desperate to seize power in South Carolina. A victory over Tim Scott would secure their majority and unlock their full-scale socialist agenda! The Left is terrified of Tim Scott because of what he represents. By his example, he’s showing millions of people that the American Dream still exists -- if you’re prepared to work hard for it. | Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts

name: Mike Collier
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Lt. Governor of Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
Today, I’m tossing my hat in the ring and officially running for lieutenant governor of Texas as a Democrat. Will you stand with me? |
#
---
I’m honored to share this with you first, patriots: **Today, I’m tossing my hat in the ring and officially running for lieutenant governor of Texas as a Democrat.[Will you stand with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37005990/309783766/-606162121?refcode=AU_MC_EG_LAU_PET_AC90_20211004_AM1_V5_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZlNTNkYS0yNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GNkZfCj-KlNJEDZc3ExqBWQMtHUUwtkeMe7TNjvHiWU=&emci=7f1c7739-1a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=006e53da-2525-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7689298)** Over the past few months, I have traveled across Texas and spoken with thousands of Texans — red voters, blue voters, and those in between. People are tired of the politics of hatred and vitriol, and of politicians putting their careers ahead of what’s right for Texans. Next November, Texans will have to answer one simple question: _Are you better off than you were four years ago?_ With over 700 deaths from a grid failure, nearly 60,000 preventable deaths to COVID-19, a lagging state economy, and our constitutional rights under attack, the fact of the matter is that Texans cannot bear four more years of Dan Patrick. It’s past time we focus on the real challenges facing our state, including fixing the damn grid, fully funding our public schools, reigning in property taxes by closing corporate loopholes, bringing good-paying jobs to our state, protecting our constitutional rights, and so much more. But the only way we can become a more united, stronger Texas is to build a people-powered movement of everyday folks ready for compassionate leadership. And that’s exactly what we’re going to do. **[The future of our great state is in your hands. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in the fight to rebuild our beloved state and deliver on the promise of a prosperous, brighter future for all Texans. clean_body: Today, I’m tossing my hat in the ring and officially running for lieutenant governor of Texas as a Democrat. Will you stand with me? | I’m honored to share this with you first, patriots: Today, I’m tossing my hat in the ring and officially running for lieutenant governor of Texas as a Democrat. Over the past few months, I have traveled across Texas and spoken with thousands of Texans — red voters, blue voters, and those in between. People are tired of the politics of hatred and vitriol, and of politicians putting their careers ahead of what’s right for Texans. Next November, Texans will have to answer one simple question: Are you better off than you were four years ago? With over 700 deaths from a grid failure, nearly 60,000 preventable deaths to COVID-19, a lagging state economy, and our constitutional rights under attack, the fact of the matter is that Texans cannot bear four more years of Dan Patrick. It’s past time we focus on the real challenges facing our state, including fixing the damn grid, fully funding our public schools, reigning in property taxes by closing corporate loopholes, bringing good-paying jobs to our state, protecting our constitutional rights, and so much more. But the only way we can become a more united, stronger Texas is to build a people-powered movement of everyday folks ready for compassionate leadership. And that’s exactly what we’re going to do. | I vow to do right and risk the consequences, as Sam Houston once advised. I will bring the voices of Texans everywhere to the Texas Senate chamber and govern by all those who call Texas home — not solely by those who voted for me. Thank you for joining me in this fight. I look forward to fighting in every county for every vote for the state I so dearly love. Let’s go win this, — Mike Collier = (P.S. Watch our launch video of Mike by clicking this.) The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

# AMPFEST 2021
---
Welcome to #AMPFest21 American Priority is excited to invite you to attend the 4th annual AMPFest! AMPFest21 is coming up quick! Whether you've never missed an AMPFest or are looking to attend your first AMP event, we have something for everybody this year. More fun, great speakers, memorable activities, and good vibes. What can you expect this year? This year the AMP Team is taking AMPFest21 to a whole new level. We want our attendees to feel like they are on vacation, so what better way than to offer all-inclusive vacation packages as options for registration. That's right, purchase the vacation package and your room and many extras are included in the ticket price. Latinos for America First is a proud sponsor of #AMPFEST21 Hope to see you all this weekend in Miami, Fl for one of the HOTTEST events of the YEAR! name: Hannah Nayowith via Mondaire for Congress
subject: Once again asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
There’s still time to help us stay on track with our goals.
#

I'll be honest:
Our team just crunched the numbers, and it turns out that we fell a bit short of our $20,000 September FEC goal.
Now, the bad news is that we won’t be able to report the number we were hoping to report for this past quarter.
But the good news is that, if everyone reading this email chips in just $3 or more, we will still be able to stay on track with our internal fundraising goals and beat out any potential opponents in the 2022 primary and general elections.
So, what do you say? Can you help us out?
**[If you’re able to make a donation to help us stay on track with our financial goals, you can do that using this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37008340/309786046/-1610829104?refcode2=aa505280-2825-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211004-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTUwNTI4MC0yODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32N7DG7MZ2kjMxUIyDsy1-UO0PItv8Pxgy9v0CxG6dE=)**
Look, this isn’t the news that I was hoping to share. But I knew that, if I was honest with you, you’d be willing to step up to help us crush our goals and run a winning campaign in 2022.
Thank you for reading,
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager

clean_body: There’s still time to help us stay on track with our goals. I'll be honest: Our team just crunched the numbers, and it turns out that we fell a bit short of our $20,000 September FEC goal. Now, the bad news is that we won’t be able to report the number we were hoping to report for this past quarter. But the good news is that, if everyone reading this email chips in just $3 or more, we will still be able to stay on track with our internal fundraising goals and beat out any potential opponents in the 2022 primary and general elections. So, what do you say? Can you help us out? = Look, this isn’t the news that I was hoping to share. But I knew that, if I was honest with you, you’d be willing to step up to help us crush our goals and run a winning campaign in 2022. Thank you for reading, Hannah Nayowith Campaign Manager = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. body:
They say Democrats are quitting
| | |
---
| | Hey Derek, I’ve got a busy afternoon campaigning today, so I’ll make this quick.

Experts are saying that Democrats have lost momentum — that we’re not as fired up to defeat Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate as we were to defeat Donald Trump in 2020.

You know what? They’re wrong. And I’m asking for your help to prove it.

So here’s my challenge to you: I want this team to raise $500,000 in the next three days to show that we’ve got what it takes to win this election. It’s a massive number and if we can hit it, I know we can send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to stomp out Trumpism in America.

_**[Will you help us get off to a strong start? Rush a donation of any amount right now — the money we raise in this three-day challenge will go directly toward our critical voter mobilization efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37008478/309786226/-2023814932?refcode=20211004.3_TM_10Z&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdlNDVlZS0yNzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eB2pDEYUPbMfMW7HDtO7KsLEDv-COXpv22S_U-RjwZM=)**_

name: Peter Franchot
subject: I’m leading the race for Governor
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
I’m incredibly excited to share this news with you. According to a recent poll reported on by Maryland Matters, I am the leading candidate in the Democratic race for Governor. This poll shows me as being the number one choice for most Marylanders by far, as well as having the highest name recognition in the Democratic field.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=20.22]This poll only confirms what voters have told me time and again on the campaign trail: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.” The energy and excitement that I’ve received from communities around the state is a testament to the growing strength of this people-powered movement -- and I’m here to tell you that we’re only just getting started.
I’ll also let you in on a little bit of inside information: Our support and name ID show that we have the highest persuasion rate of any campaign in the field. We secured 17% support with a name ID of 65%, meaning we are already winning 1 out of every 3.8 voters who are following our campaign. Other leading candidates secured much lower persuasion rates, such as 1 out of every 4.4 voters, and 1 out of every 7.3 voters.
That means our campaign has the strongest message in the field, and as long as we share that message with every voter, we can earn the support of more undecided voters than any campaign in the race.
This is a major moment for our campaign, and we can’t let our momentum go to waste. I am leading the Democratic race for Governor -- and with your help, we can pull ahead even further. Fresh off the heels of this announcement, we’re looking to raise $3,000 in grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight, and a groundswell of donations will easily help us get there. So, what do you say?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober]Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. I’m building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and grassroots supporters like you are crucial to our efforts. Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022, and deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the quality of life they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pollupdateoctober?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0898da4f-2e25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/1a22f99c-3025-ec11-981f-501ac510a405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTIyZjk5Yy0zMDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGMKB4MGNxGvLq4tfcDaz9y0f7wr9jRB-s3vQ4zWfMo=&id=136194660 .

# AMPFEST 2021
---
Welcome to #AMPFest21 American Priority is excited to invite you to attend the 4th annual AMPFest! AMPFest21 is coming up quick! Whether you've never missed an AMPFest or are looking to attend your first AMP event, we have something for everybody this year. More fun, great speakers, memorable activities, and good vibes. What can you expect this year? This year the AMP Team is taking AMPFest21 to a whole new level. We want our attendees to feel like they are on vacation, so what better way than to offer all-inclusive vacation packages as options for registration. That's right, purchase the vacation package and your room and many extras are included in the ticket price. Latinos for America First is a proud sponsor of #AMPFEST21 Hope to see you all this weekend in Miami, Fl for one of the HOTTEST events of the YEAR! Our President and State Directors will be on a panel discussing "Why Latinos support America First"! Our President Bianca Gracia will also be featured on Sunday's Women's Panel.

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8d0ot97fmp98d8208ifcbvr1mj2jljfjfn7dpq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cphmao36c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ttpk5dq5p6i8v19od28f77ariicbme57rca5bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cphmao36c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4auig4jeh4jou8tf5pqbueca6djnq7in1199ri0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cphmao36c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

It’s Jason. The November 2nd election is just around the corner. It’s been an amazing campaign, and **I believe we will win this race on election day and set Virginia on the right path.**

But to do that, we will need every eligible voter we can get. The first step to voting in Virginia is registering, **and the deadline to register is** _**October 12th.**_

We need to change that, Friend, and I need your help to do so. [**→ Register to vote today!**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=40a7657235ee4d80b739b0818b8f59b5&_e=-pPYkpR9XdeyuLyNXpkWv_8T26Ys4LG59SbTmRi3DBgC3xBw-4ZoG-nBq4eqzUH-K8E66IJtA3VCzZYq__0oDKeE5hbCmj0el8xukrLtbX6sF8SGOjmqdxxRxnaBEKcy7Jqdxgk9lpk3GepBaSuiYsiRcmtSrAXPcng82eux030zfLJff8jmk0P0UO9tuhGQJ-YNuTjwFaN3aEgdN4l3KPo2MQfv4OMM9lfV6lHapDJjSsQGpV8rNegplyccCM6gOWnMaqC2SutnphDK6PEl7efNAwVAwvy0f411vauFplqaJRsVrhrAZBKP6V4e5wkSBCA1z_KblBR2HIkX-u1b-uI7v6CNmg1JMVdTkvEc-Yhs8AOWiMscXOd2uzp_p67869znu5pi0dAiqv-Gm44w_to1_vsyLlZ-4hbFqvp1A5lcvqubKdsW620GCOamEjpT4CHRkry62I5mSKnxvBR0znWAZn6h2BWBqXJ7exN06Q4%3D)

subject: Race raters are giving Donald Trump’s candidate a 50-50 shot to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGKqTwBGEzbvWadw7zixoz6GGt8fAhlJKAFf0i1emkGwVI39GqVxvy1-pu-F2scKHqx8V_kI5BO0ALcc7C3dp_MBHnM1G8Nfl2kvfZi0DpR58eGu9UBFnGIxj9jqvXyQiY4InvdNE9bVUjr7H0IzI1vuqAr2vwZlqLFbg4iy_B0pzdLzNySZZdiuPeHQ0Z-D086I840Cly_qGx8FFh81H0js_FKFhdv7lRZegWbYB5iq_NOh5zfDQyA0rK64QD4-q3ji1hRH4zdyVb7p6k_hKuGOvDpV3doMvYNMsee6VxjUWxb_lQpS4lrePBClIFUoWabS1lNVESGf-2zUhcnVXpYU/3fv/qjKtunrAQhKXxmKJKIv7vw/h0/1GAwURoc8SSK0e9WjD7R8UrdrhzQqIjf4_8RMAQvGnc)
Derek, we’ve got some troubling news: **Virginia was just rated a TOSS-UP by _The Cook Political Report.__And_ _it's_ _October already._**

They _**downgraded**_ Democrats' chances of winning, and they’re giving extremist Trump Republicans a 50-50 shot at winning the Virginia Governor’s office.

My opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has been endorsed by Donald Trump four times. Four times! And he’s screaming from the rooftops that he’s _proud_ of it. He even said Donald Trump “represents so much of why [he’s] running!”

I want to thank you, Peter.

I’m so grateful for your support and your help each month -- it’s thanks to you that we hit our End of Quarter goal.

And while I should be ecstatic, there’s an issue our state is facing right now that is bringing me back down to Earth.

**Republicans are closing the gap on our Democratic advantage of registered voters in Florida.**

Let me explain what this means, Peter:

**Each election comes down to the votes, and if Republicans have more registered voters than our Democrats in Florida, their chances of winning and maintaining the status quo in our state grows exponentially.**

That’s why just last week, I donated to our Florida Democratic Party to ensure we have the resources to register voters up and down our state.

**I know it’s not enough to just win elections, Peter -- it’s about leaving this Democratic Party with more advantages than we had before.**

I know the more voters we can get involved in our elections means the more chances for our democracy to flourish.

So today, I’m asking you to stand with me, and pledge to do your own part to elect Democrats up and down the ballot right here in Florida.

subject: We can't lose our momentum

body:
| | |
---
Team – We just closed the books on another fundraising quarter, but we cannot lose our momentum. Republicans only have to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and they are laser-focused on New Hampshire. With Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate eyeing this seat and another far-right candidate already running, we can't afford to give an inch. That's why Team Maggie is working hard to build a winning campaign. From on-the-ground organizers to TV and digital ads, we're gearing up as early as possible to ensure that we reach every Granite Stater. In a race as competitive as this one, it's going to take all of us working together to protect our fragile Senate majority. So we're humbly asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help us keep our ads on the air and organizers on the ground across the Granite State?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37019560/309820381/-214106137?refcode=e20211004_staff-momentum&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI0NzIxMi00MTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UbeajkdBhRBCAInd2AoJK1HRJNbDLEXoyPrzCZkgDh4=)** | | [Count me in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37019562/309820383/-214106137?refcode=e20211004_staff-momentum&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI0NzIxMi00MTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UbeajkdBhRBCAInd2AoJK1HRJNbDLEXoyPrzCZkgDh4=)

**[So please, donate $5 today to help us keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37019563/309820385/-214106137?refcode=e20211004_staff-momentum&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGI0NzIxMi00MTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UbeajkdBhRBCAInd2AoJK1HRJNbDLEXoyPrzCZkgDh4=)**

subject: Facebook is down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
This is bad news for us
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37021093/309825800/-2023814932?refcode=20211004.FBD_AH_10FBD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTAwOWIyMC00NTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dcz9I2EhPlifXSS3_YvL6NwKyeo4ke4pmpwttJR8Otc=)

| | Derek, by now, I'm sure you've seen the news that Facebook is down worldwide.

_This is really bad news for Terry’s campaign._ Here’s why:

Every day, we raise $50,000 from our massive digital outreach program — and the bulk of that comes from our Facebook ads! **With Facebook down, we’re losing out on that critical source of fundraising.**

With less than a month until the election, we can’t afford to miss our fundraising benchmarks on even one day — especially because we’re being outraised by Donald Trump’s candidate.

**_[I’m coming to you right now with an urgent request: will you help us make up the difference by chipping into this email right now? clean_body: This is bad news for us | | | = | | Derek, by now, I'm sure you've seen the news that Facebook is down worldwide. This is really bad news for Terry’s campaign. Here’s why: Every day, we raise $50,000 from our massive digital outreach program — and the bulk of that comes from our Facebook ads! With Facebook down, we’re losing out on that critical source of fundraising. With less than a month until the election, we can’t afford to miss our fundraising benchmarks on even one day — especially because we’re being outraised by Donald Trump’s candidate. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up in this critical moment, Alaina Haworth Digital Director Terry for VA =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Friend, I decided to run for governor because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer...
---
_The hardworking people of Wisconsin deserve good jobs, our kids deserve to be allowed into the classroom, and our families deserve to live in safe neighborhoods._
---
But Tony Evers doesn’t care what the PEOPLE deserve, he only cares about one man -- _himself_.
---
I saw the state that I love being failed time and again by a left-wing governor more determined to please special interests and liberal unions than protect his own citizens.
---
Enough is enough. We must FIRE Tony Evers.
---

But with the ad-buy deadline TONIGHT at 9:45 P.M., I’m counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help raise the remaining $23,575 we need to run this ad. Friend, I decided to run for governor because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer... The hardworking people of Wisconsin deserve good jobs, our kids deserve to be allowed into the classroom, and our families deserve to live in safe neighborhoods. But Tony Evers doesn’t care what the PEOPLE deserve, he only cares about one man -- himself. I saw the state that I love being failed time and again by a left-wing governor more determined to please special interests and liberal unions than protect his own citizens. Enough is enough. We must FIRE Tony Evers. But first, I need your help reaching our goal for our Ad Fund so that every voter hears our conservative message and the TRUTH about Tony Evers. subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfg3ielrk4c78iqjbv84hoafb54hshh24gl13gag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1ctnm9gm6djnmhjrecpke9h6fcjhm1ij0ohgchj3bdbhmhr6aorncqr60p1m61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eapmcc3immp60tr2cooj1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpj6cpr1cjh66oh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zovmfepr549kueoto5h3n1uf69toirp7ud9cn44g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdubah7em7auk7bsnamtaroheoi3kb5o8rjjgjb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1vmr2c8ucart7hsbe8jf690sf186jilv0p515g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkpul8tbm209h5tkne1b8hbmnd69rkav7u45d05g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2632c11vm1n6nufhpler6q0mebnf9onp716ptg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8d55mdrqjfnbr2p8bbldoavagocvgr31gdbpm48_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm2p72cdh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

The federal Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend,

Back in 2005 as a college freshman, I saw how poorly the War in Iraq was going. So I decided the best way to do something about it was to enlist and try doing my part. After active duty, I returned to college and graduated in 2011. I then rejoined the Army Reserves where I've served ever since.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37021904/309828523/-209993060?refcode=em-10421-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVjZDYzOS00OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TMUWAdNDuiP3H_DqVW4vNBaG9Tcq9BEcBulSw0YN7Ec=)
**Army Reserve Soldiers are required to spend one weekend per month and several weeks per year at training. That’s what I’ll be up to for the next couple of weeks -- away at training.**

For good reason, the Army forbids campaign activity during training. That means I won't be able to attend campaign events as usual.

I'll be honest, I'm concerned about losing momentum, so I'm setting a goal of raising $25,000 in online donations while I'm at drill to make sure we don't skip a beat while I'm gone.

name: Michele Rayner
subject: Our campaign is growing because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37021939/309828676/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVkNjk2My00OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_7BG60hC7TO9cyWC8NWQokF949aOTjodVKf_aQ89gs=)

This end-of-quarter was one for the books, Peter. It was intense, but we made it through.

Times are tough, and the fact that you chose to put some of your hard-earned money toward this campaign means the world.

I don't take that lightly, and it's why I'm working tirelessly so that today and every day when I'm elected to Congress, I can show up for you as best as possible. You can rest assured that I'll get right to work on the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones, just like I have in all my time throughout my years of public service.

**This district deserves _better_ representation, with a representative who is beholden to no one but her constituents.**

That's why our campaign isn't powered by corporate PACs or dark money -- it's powered by _people_. I'm so grateful that it keeps growing day after day, week after week. We're beating the odds and growing this campaign.

So thank you, Peter. It's because of supporters like you that we were able to break new ground in this campaign, and I'm truly grateful. And once we stick together and continue to fight the good fight -- even as Republicans try to bully us into submission -- we will win this race.

Thanks for being part of this campaign -- we couldn't do this without you.

\-- Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37021940/309828677/-578272527?refcode=em21_211004_eoqty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVkNjk2My00OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_7BG60hC7TO9cyWC8NWQokF949aOTjodVKf_aQ89gs=)

body:

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I will continue to defend reproductive rights -- no matter what
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We marched to make sure every woman deserves the ability to decide what to do with her own body. End of discussion. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37022812/309832243/601477077?refcode=20211004_p_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmY5ZTJkMy00YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n84ebHpJ7LbHIAq3ig_O_mt2-A7xjUPNCgAGarfv_4U=)
---

Friends,

When the U.S. Supreme Court handed down Roe v. Wade in 1973, they were making a clear declaration: a woman’s body belongs to her. But the attacks on self-determination didn’t end in 1973. Ever since, people have had to continue marching and demonstrating in defense of reproductive rights, just as we did all over Florida this Saturday.

That’s because right now, reproductive rights are in more danger than ever. As we speak, one Republican state representative has already introduced an extreme new bill to Florida’s legislature that mirrors Texas’ near-total ban on the right to choose. It’s _critical_ that we speak up and defend every person’s right to make their own reproductive decisions.

**[_Please add your name and join me in demanding that Gov. DeSantis and Florida Republicans stop their attack on reproductive rights._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37022813/309832244/-168713785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmY5ZTJkMy00YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n84ebHpJ7LbHIAq3ig_O_mt2-A7xjUPNCgAGarfv_4U=&emci=0efc6e23-2c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=9bf9e2d3-4c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=8807089)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37022814/309832245/-168713785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmY5ZTJkMy00YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n84ebHpJ7LbHIAq3ig_O_mt2-A7xjUPNCgAGarfv_4U=&emci=0efc6e23-2c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=9bf9e2d3-4c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=8807089)
---
I have always believed that every woman deserves the ability to decide what to do with her own body. End of discussion. But right now, that right is under attack, and we have to speak up to defend it -- which is why it was so inspirational to see thousands of Floridians turn out to participate in the Women’s March on Saturday.

We cannot allow the constitutional right to choose to be swept away by politicians who don’t respect the Constitution -- or by ideologically driven judges who don’t respect precedent.

No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians -- those decisions must remain between a woman, her family, her medical provider and her faith. As Florida’s 44th governor, I vetoed an anti-choice bill, and in Congress, I voted against a 20-week abortion ban. As your next governor, I will continue to defend reproductive rights -- no matter what.

You have my word.

**[_I cannot be silent on this. Please join me in calling on Gov. DeSantis and his allies in the legislature to respect the constitutional right to choose._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37022815/309832246/-168713785?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmY5ZTJkMy00YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n84ebHpJ7LbHIAq3ig_O_mt2-A7xjUPNCgAGarfv_4U=&emci=0efc6e23-2c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=9bf9e2d3-4c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=8807089)**

\-- Charlie Crist

| | Derek, With less than a month until Election Day, I wanted to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor. We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians. And that’s exactly why I’m running. I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history. I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescriptions medications. I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia. I’m running because the time has long passed for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.** **And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.** **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll support the Democratic Party of Virginia today by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. I can’t do this without you, Derek:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37023019/309834281/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211004-tfvawhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmJiOGVhYS00ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0xV468B6W4Vrb-BXCAkOMNnsEAG2GFTTZRCKH4CHGys=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Derek, With less than a month until Election Day, I wanted to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor. We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians. And that’s exactly why I’m running. I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a quality education — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history. I’m running because every Virginian has a right to affordable, quality health care and prescriptions medications. I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to curb gun violence in Virginia. I’m running because the time has long passed for innovative strategies to secure our clean energy future. And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for being on this team, Terry McAuliffe = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org.
