name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6utmnj32lcfsn1a2k7hrltcpjl1cbvgpou28cqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdk6cpmdclh6up3ddhj6sq38tbgc5i34cphcmr67djk6ioe2sjkcipbap5jc1rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb6phgeaqradtiehj30s5ic8r749fg)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmk7rqv0r64bj74vvd04g6nvc1f6qlvg7608t13g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdvimkhmni1ib754focflnsoigb7vo8htbbse2e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4pv2r58n1r5k543o752ojjd3o2mltr35nhg7qg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4vr3onjfcu0bjm9qoepruamjcj941qlpif2m27g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeao4vdaut9l70riqg59iikurcjnk2qarv4rkofg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4oiqbq9ot9rj65qik46sdvv8l9remuuldft4kp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjmeor1cph2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi08dd82puqnpeuapgqrlgfc3r3l0doqrqu4k8g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pd7of1o9doake3e4eg6cvbhtogt4bnrv65mmco_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj8u2mio76j9jvivtklp65ka6kkiu0phmi4hkcb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6np5l439vsubi2eos6ciakckvr21np7qti814cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgv633b1d23i10bq4rv0ftmp9tt1p046smagfuj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmot0pbt6nl0qdnishr7k76nf7ag2v36kf1qtpjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvbjphnm8ie5n0l0rfjnvtq5uvcjnkru6p1u43n0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziutisen0qdt6k8ck4p5n378f99e6crcu1pdc438_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cpj6ep71chie49fg)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: CNN leading the charge against our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2eaa71da713c4354b21e718ef2603e36&_e=37grp3DP6VizfNlOjzL18wpXF3YH2TVSLK7d_nGY-D1HMH3Pnw9vD8MSR77oAXXB-Z9eZrDOGWMs4QgEEOBsksi4v3vzwugNVZtJOjkvrhOmYe_B-c-5GoNuuyQpkQAffiNjJlYpvcZyJV6sJ4fYmhyGH2lWjjcJz7GN6Rs9OjujkonpBI10xsU2es-csc7vgJR4Ud4vAhav2qHoGZcsKjF8MLchuVQNTJdOe9Nphl2QkbujEADUW8sb5yzqy6kdEVopcbpokO3L_EttRUR5TdiaDnWOF2raPP8qUt76asPZEnW1GRcSgv7bFARSfBz7bZo6sHukvU5IS-eFd9bucjedzlDYMsTIUV3ZYdKLG81n_sqy8tEJ7Bp7uy9WHBz58ppugECoxlKR1y48mBT6svrKCLyWFcD5VdMSfTB5_ntUZk3FPAJ3gXvGKqskWPbiWRNVm0QZxI3lMQD5Iabpd6c5GjxTqRI-d9GyADeDs8c%3D)

---
Peter,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Peter, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2eaa71da713c4354b21e718ef2603e36&_e=37grp3DP6VizfNlOjzL18wpXF3YH2TVSLK7d_nGY-D1HMH3Pnw9vD8MSR77oAXXB-Z9eZrDOGWMs4QgEEOBsksi4v3vzwugNVZtJOjkvrhOmYe_B-c-5GoNuuyQpkQAffiNjJlYpvcZyJV6sJ4fYmhyGH2lWjjcJz7GN6Rs9OjujkonpBI10xsU2es-csc7vgJR4Ud4vAhav2qHoGZcsKjF8MLchuVQNTJdOe9Nphl2QkbujEADUW8sb5yzqy6kdEVopcbpokO3L_EttRUR5TQKSj4LTA-oBwp0wtG7QQ_6iBu3pWUWnxkl1INZqmotf08Jd8LkuqqbK9S3QYHrCJsJzIzBdZMZXdwb4pa38UL6Rryq4BlrQY4yZDEgVYO8tvNIxoY9ZKVvL6pvqb924xxaaa5292yQoGOIKq5rrhBe9FJ3j2Hsnu2xCCWMkkjJHumbR0WaJg4VLxUYROlud0DgbiiZn_d85_0mq5OPUO9E%3D)**

When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2eaa71da713c4354b21e718ef2603e36&_e=37grp3DP6VizfNlOjzL18wpXF3YH2TVSLK7d_nGY-D1HMH3Pnw9vD8MSR77oAXXB-Z9eZrDOGWMs4QgEEOBsksi4v3vzwugNVZtJOjkvrhOmYe_B-c-5GoNuuyQpkQAffiNjJlYpvcZyJV6sJ4fYmhyGH2lWjjcJz7GN6Rs9OjujkonpBI10xsU2es-csc7vgJR4Ud4vAhav2qHoGZcsKjF8MLchuVQNTJdOe9Nphl2QkbujEADUW8sb5yzqy6kdEVopcbpokO3L_EttRUR5TTMogGX4PaGWwl6c3gNr3lW7B5Hfnh0V7YlSKtfbVCVwSMTgURwtPxBGT6xNc8a9_GDC7BovjMnr68TV5Q7bsOs6GGE5y1h-r_pQ8HX-tQGvY8Q__9CjxCgba-SGdrqMez0d_hEGE52sSfUKfGVVs6PDTzcOF18COEEpw5WAyxr3kh1cxR681uWwA4XIw8XKzKWClQ_iC91Y4k1oW2SNEOE%3D)**

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, The Cook Political Report recently downgraded the Virginia Governor's race from "leans Democrat" to "toss-up." This is not good news, but it’s also not surprising; we knew this was going to be a tough fight. I could not repeat this enough: Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. For Democrats, it's also a major test ahead of next year's midterm elections. What we accomplish in Virginia will show what we can achieve across the country. With early voting officially underway and polls showing a virtual tie, I'm asking you to do everything you can, right now, to help my friend Terry McAuliffe win. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Terry needs our support right now because his Trump-backed opponent has a huge resource advantage. Terry's opponent has already written millions of dollars in checks to his campaign. In fact, he's promised to spend up to $75 million to win. An election this important shouldn't be auctioned off to the highest bidder. That's why I'm so proud of how Terry's running his campaign. Unlike his opponent, Terry is building the largest small-dollar donor army in Virginia political history. People like you chipping in $15, $25, or anything they can afford are who power his campaign. And in a race against a self-funding opponent trying to buy his way into office, your support is giving Terry a real chance to win. Look, we have to win. True racism has always resided where you least expect it.

I worked for President Donald Trump and I'm about as brown as you can get. Not once did I experience racism from anyone in the Trump administration.

But every time my name is in the news I get bombarded with disgusting messages from rabid lunatics.

They have called me every slur in the book, consistently showing their true colors!

Clearly, they're terrified of me!

They know that I don't mess around and I'm coming after them.

**[I just launched a LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media to help everyday Americans who've been smeared by the Democrat Fake News machine.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh9mj5jigguvug6jd3p7krb8k3lha5mdm69q8c78_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpjm9ob4cth2bs)**

So, they have good reason to be afraid of me.

Fellow Patriot:

Here at CPI, our mission is to fight back against those who want to divide our country and erase the principles and values that have made America the greatest nation in history.

We're taking action by providing resources, facilities, and staff that conservatives have never had before.

What we're building is much more than just a home for conservatism in DC. We're building a movement for what is right all across the country. It's a movement for America.

The need has never been greater. The time to act is now.

**[Please watch our new video explaining CPI's mission and share it with your family and friends.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcrj9tdeviil0qb6573p1646u8bk25ep31v6cjg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cpge8oj4cph2bs)**

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8866%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KOzjGyBZCtXKObvHs%2fL%2fJA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15689%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VMppY%2fXfSHaiIyLuQL5GfQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15680%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=40AG0LY3G9JmX%2bJ7CyEstw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15680%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=40AG0LY3G9JmX%2bJ7CyEstw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8866%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KOzjGyBZCtXKObvHs%2fL%2fJA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8866%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KOzjGyBZCtXKObvHs%2fL%2fJA&sysid=1)

name: Josh Harder
subject: I appreciate everything you’ve done
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/h11IldPfwqB7VZhHMPRXcATveS6Aq1YLG1q1KIXbv6I=/kvTCMPFlmisOxaNr4zcSFrmFiCw0jS1xwQtbLTbnV7s=?refcode=E11669-20211004-ThankYou-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter - I hate to sound cliche, but I really do have the most amazing supporters in the world. I wanted to reach out and just to say thank you so much for everything you've done. Last month was a really tough one for me and my campaign. We had the first poll of this election cycle showing us down 7 points, new GOP attack ads hitting me on TV, and we were up against our most important end-of-quarter deadline yet. It was vital we didn't fall short or Republicans were going to double down on their efforts to flip this seat red. Through it all, you have had my back, and **I 'm happy to share that we hit our goal!** We can be extremely proud of the next fundraising report we're about to send in. We couldn't do this without you, and I know that Republicans are going to look at our report, see the sheer number of individual contributions made to our campaign and think twice about buying that next set of attack ads. It's a huge win. Cheers to a great way to end September. We're gonna win this thing!
Josh

clean_body: | | Peter - I hate to sound cliche, but I really do have the most amazing supporters in the world. I wanted to reach out and just to say thank you so much for everything you've done. Last month was a really tough one for me and my campaign. We had the first poll of this election cycle showing us down 7 points, new GOP attack ads hitting me on TV, and we were up against our most important end-of-quarter deadline yet. It was vital we didn't fall short or Republicans were going to double down on their efforts to flip this seat red. Through it all, you have had my back, and I 'm happy to share that we hit our goal! We can be extremely proud of the next fundraising report we're about to send in. We couldn't do this without you, and I know that Republicans are going to look at our report, see the sheer number of individual contributions made to our campaign and think twice about buying that next set of attack ads. It's a huge win. Cheers to a great way to end September. We're gonna win this thing! Josh = =

name: Hala (personal)
subject: I’m the product of gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026442/309846734/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQwYzMyNC01ODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fb34JD7JlwW-DtqbP03_mldaN4F_aZ2Y4esyaWAspU=)
---
Peter, I need to have a conversation with you about an issue close to my heart.

**I’m the product of gun violence.**

When I was just two years old, I lost my biological father to gun violence. And I know I’m not alone.

Gun violence touches so many of us — loved ones are taken too soon, children are robbed of having a chance at life, and nobody is better off because of it.

**This is why I take gun control reform so seriously.**

As Chief Deputy Whip in the House of Delegates, I’ve led the charge to strengthen the Commonwealth’s weak record regarding gun control.

And I got results — **our Democratic majority expanded background checks, passed “red flag” laws, and extended the wait period in an effort to keep guns out of dangerous hands.**

Peter, I will be your advocate as Lt. Governor to build upon this progress. I know families, students, and all Virginians are worth it — _no one should lose a loved one to gun violence like I did._

But my Republican opponent doesn’t feel the same way. Winsome Sears has no plan to curb the gun violence epidemic.

[**So I’m calling on you, Peter, to help get me to the Lt. Governor’s office to continue our fight. Will you contribute $3 or any amount tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026443/309846735/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211004_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQwYzMyNC01ODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fb34JD7JlwW-DtqbP03_mldaN4F_aZ2Y4esyaWAspU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026449/309846741/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20211004_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQwYzMyNC01ODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fb34JD7JlwW-DtqbP03_mldaN4F_aZ2Y4esyaWAspU=)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Distorting facts is what Democrats do best
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=67176a5fb2e74a7a8f89b4f08cd5aa47&_e=1BCVCB9Ut1XDBsFyOwZINMlT8XcNMzdEOabmBbkdVtXCfo_CVRQdHvPljj7XNPWqswGdMiBZS9piglCqozoSFj0e0SXeinUH0xGoQyyiBiWiSIFh1en9liBCISFZY5oWK97fuvX8lUxsRgFaMxnfkEwn-Dk2ewrVP1h_6gHcfrwN_WGjvJQoN7hogM_VmMgyKAOTP0DokYrcjclXQ4pbw4ce0i7uInNUrmQUtKutIDQCOs5YC01CRh55mzUMY7S_v36np4LtKW-L7XQeJUX-tOuk_GznWP1fZkb8kT-99UI2K5UapF4Otl19amXyfJsVMUQj-pDFXa4H_hzHf2JlkehtXfMtzuKNlzaNSz5PCPO6uo8kXATaQMOz0lplyj-nXCVJTvnSADeMyFHKhE4_btxJLcKkvSbC4pV9a4EsJelz8f6mqktPdsRW7rI3vzK4oDMfN-3PVks4STYuJjsrYLPgr-IbDljrfi5xOHcpg2w%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=67176a5fb2e74a7a8f89b4f08cd5aa47&_e=1BCVCB9Ut1XDBsFyOwZINMlT8XcNMzdEOabmBbkdVtXCfo_CVRQdHvPljj7XNPWqswGdMiBZS9piglCqozoSFj0e0SXeinUH0xGoQyyiBiWiSIFh1en9liBCISFZY5oWK97fuvX8lUxsRgFaMxnfkEwn-Dk2ewrVP1h_6gHcfrwN_WGjvJQoN7hogM_VmMgyKAOTP0DokYrcjclXQ4pbw4ce0i7uInNUrmQUtKutIDQCOs5YC01CRh55mzUMY7S_7fzQh5hzIq56rRc_6KOUc2ctmw3f09cKTyykcS13B9pgTy7MKY3wihKgKFUuNVVjNIuBEceKs0Qd-ndu3JlOUo6tZI4Sgteccvx6Po7nzJlr4p3fg21TaaDWJG1FnXFkmypzw8L45V_9UXPBJUY1mp2EGzfKiqpJSJe-LPA1dwGwe-p8420hzYBxjY6gCWOht3U8-fgPw19Gm7MPl9nw26_QU8M4dL1glsumMONdFVA%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=67176a5fb2e74a7a8f89b4f08cd5aa47&_e=1BCVCB9Ut1XDBsFyOwZINMlT8XcNMzdEOabmBbkdVtXCfo_CVRQdHvPljj7XNPWqswGdMiBZS9piglCqozoSFj0e0SXeinUH0xGoQyyiBiWiSIFh1en9liBCISFZY5oWK97fuvX8lUxsRgFaMxnfkEwn-Dk2ewrVP1h_6gHcfrwN_WGjvJQoN7hogM_VmMgyKAOTP0DokYrcjclXQ4pbw4ce0i7uInNUrmQUtKutIDQCOs5YC01CRh55mzUMY7S_1TzjwWHbOWprDpnACn6z1pAKqkf0odsjYoz2JthNsn-cB1bxQmhsW2LBdpYcM6N6aEMe8autFGt1UbYpB-Q0PeN6P6vxQyF3f6i_W1OR9qzmbO2_Fs99h-acgzRdcsnR_IrcAXfeQCFsjFZgR3GkIIcGIZsGcHirzPKUIYkqTgSZfLi61plrxnyrSTjHqc94DSVcSQXBgBnrW3I3FCHkq2iGhDHgcX-sonyvRj9KoNo%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=67176a5fb2e74a7a8f89b4f08cd5aa47&_e=1BCVCB9Ut1XDBsFyOwZINMlT8XcNMzdEOabmBbkdVtXCfo_CVRQdHvPljj7XNPWqswGdMiBZS9piglCqozoSFj0e0SXeinUH0xGoQyyiBiWiSIFh1en9liBCISFZY5oWK97fuvX8lUxsRgFaMxnfkEwn-Dk2ewrVP1h_6gHcfrwN_WGjvJQoN7hogM_VmMgyKAOTP0DokYrcjclXQ4pbw4ce0i7uInNUrmQUtKutIDQCOs5YC01CRh55mzUMY7S_REcTZYsw4ufIBGWoCdTE9p1gRq4KnvUuRa4RxWJjiItBhHw1hVx83FBhchBqCUjcAuD6lkl0uDhLN_EkQowbLRH7OAPNjMR9zkZeJIxFXmLjMsvL5-KoQ6X3Ux_xZzEmGbgGIjq6x8IQAc4fjoaMrC9S2mtzHbo4XLxFufOdjFIXIJ60gVsyZb2duH6LUzcI2RbSyoQ2dIdnXEwtCTAGNvgfOOEW9qltGMenLhiwiHg%3D)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

clean_body: CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. | Fellow American, I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity. CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth. The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections. Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy. My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

---
| Peter,

On Thursday night, our campaign closed the books on our third quarter of fundraising. **Because of your ongoing support of this campaign, our team, and me, we surpassed our end-of-quarter goal.** I am sincerely grateful and appreciative that we had such a successful quarter and wanted to say thank you to you, Peter.

It means so much to me that you support our campaign by contributing, volunteering, amplifying our message on social media, or talking to your friends and neighbors. As I run for re-election in one of the most competitive districts in the nation, these actions make a considerable difference in our ability to run another winning campaign in 2022.

**It 's a privilege to serve the people of Central Virginia in Congress**, and I appreciate the opportunity to do so, thanks to the support I receive from people like you.

With gratitude,

Abigail

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: how did they even get there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**ALERT: OUR BORDER IS OVERWHELMED!** It's time to secure our border and put an end to Biden's immigration crisis. **[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58467948:JuwWdG2NA:m:1:3253819041:D94A3E14B2462504BFCAF4238DC61180:r) ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58467948:JuwWdG2NA:m:1:3253819041:D94A3E14B2462504BFCAF4238DC61180:r) | |
---
Peter, President Biden has turned immigration into a humanitarian crisis.

For months, we've faced a record number of undocumented migrants flooding our southern border from all over Mexico and central America.

Now, somehow, we've got thousands of Haitian refugees attempting to come in through Texas. _(You 've seen the pictures, I'm sure.)_

❌ No one is asking HOW these migrants got to our border.
❌ No one is reporting the reason they came through Mexico is BECAUSE of Biden's open border policies.
❌ And no one is being clear about where we draw the line on Biden's disastrous immigration policies.

**I 'm drawing the line NOW. **If we don't, it's never going to stop. And today, I want you to join me in demanding we secure our border and hold Biden accountable.
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58467948:JuwWdG2NA:m:1:3253819041:D94A3E14B2462504BFCAF4238DC61180:r)

Peter, Biden's border failures are too great to ignore.
* He's dismantled Trump-era policies that protected our country.
* He's encouraged sanctuary cities.
* He continues to invite millions into our country, despite the fact that all authorities have said they are overwhelmed and cannot properly track the influx of individuals.

It's a complete disaster. And without us demanding better, there'd be no end in sight.****

**[I AGREE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58467948:JuwWdG2NA:m:1:3253819041:D94A3E14B2462504BFCAF4238DC61180:r) **

President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the mainstream media will continue to operate as if this enormous burden on our country doesn't even exist.

**But I won't.**

We must protect America first, and to do that we're going to have to stand together to reject this destructive open-borders agenda.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, We’ve been through a lot over the past month and truthfully, things aren’t slowing down one bit. Democrats have a few short weeks to address the looming debt ceiling and prevent the first-ever U.S. default which could lead to an economic catastrophe. The GOP would rather torpedo our economy, at the expense of the American people, than work alongside Democrats to address past expenditures — including the trillions in spending under Trump. Now more than ever, we need to abolish the filibuster since Mitch McConnell continues to rule the Senate from the minority and obstruct any path to progress — or even our creditworthiness as a nation. To add to the importance of this month, the House will soon vote on the infrastructure bill and the reconciliation package. Both are critical, and we need to get them done. We have a narrow window of opportunity to move President Biden’s agenda forward by addressing climate change, expanding Medicare, investing in affordable housing, and so much more. With all of these significant votes coming up in October, I wanted to check-in and get your thoughts. **[Can you take a minute or two to fill out my October Priorities Survey? We have some pressing priorities ahead of us and I want to make sure I’m fighting for the issues you care about most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026943/309848545/53668680?contactdata=XyLDBMHX7BHz8vGi2Mc9AJf5qMtawz%2B1NoAzkRpmePwK1r5yv%2BRSCmgg5Mzn5FQxq6YhQnBk%2Br3n9kE%2FJ3oCYENb0%2B4rvCitZpxMzSYs5ePy%2BIOltmm9b%2BMNOEBDcI8NwrE7rPhBNVetCJTP%2BuQdscZ%2BcDBWwn271BAglqpPZ4I%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDRkMmJiOC01OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Rk6t5APkKHRX7tmQkjEJgZr4Xy0wU1XhLZj-zins0U=&emci=d15935d9-4a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=304d2bb8-5925-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=33917617)** | | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026945/309848550/53668680?contactdata=XyLDBMHX7BHz8vGi2Mc9AJf5qMtawz%2B1NoAzkRpmePwK1r5yv%2BRSCmgg5Mzn5FQxq6YhQnBk%2Br3n9kE%2FJ3oCYENb0%2B4rvCitZpxMzSYs5ePy%2BIOltmm9b%2BMNOEBDcI8NwrE7rPhBNVetCJTP%2BuQdscZ%2BcDBWwn271BAglqpPZ4I%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDRkMmJiOC01OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Rk6t5APkKHRX7tmQkjEJgZr4Xy0wU1XhLZj-zins0U=&emci=d15935d9-4a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=304d2bb8-5925-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=33917617)
---
Even though it feels like we encounter a new roadblock every day from the GOP, there is a path forward. We need to expand our slim Democratic majorities in the midterm elections and finally abolish the filibuster, an archaic Senate rule that is making Congress dysfunctional.
We can and must pass important pieces of legislation such as the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ , _HR 1_ , the _John Lewis Voting Rights Improvement Act_ , the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , and more.
We must defeat the GOP and put a stop to tactics they are using which have no place in a functional democracy. We can do that by electing more Democrats up and down the ballot.
It’s going to take millions of Americans to overcome the party of Trump’s anti-democratic voter suppression tactics, but I know we can do it.
**[Right now, can you take a minute to complete my survey? It’s quick and will give me a sense of what’s most important to you as our Democratic majority continues to fight to fix our economy, uphold our democracy, and save our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026946/309848552/53668680?contactdata=XyLDBMHX7BHz8vGi2Mc9AJf5qMtawz%2B1NoAzkRpmePwK1r5yv%2BRSCmgg5Mzn5FQxq6YhQnBk%2Br3n9kE%2FJ3oCYENb0%2B4rvCitZpxMzSYs5ePy%2BIOltmm9b%2BMNOEBDcI8NwrE7rPhBNVetCJTP%2BuQdscZ%2BcDBWwn271BAglqpPZ4I%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDRkMmJiOC01OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Rk6t5APkKHRX7tmQkjEJgZr4Xy0wU1XhLZj-zins0U=&emci=d15935d9-4a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=304d2bb8-5925-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=33917617)**
| [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37026947/309848553/53668680?contactdata=XyLDBMHX7BHz8vGi2Mc9AJf5qMtawz%2B1NoAzkRpmePwK1r5yv%2BRSCmgg5Mzn5FQxq6YhQnBk%2Br3n9kE%2FJ3oCYENb0%2B4rvCitZpxMzSYs5ePy%2BIOltmm9b%2BMNOEBDcI8NwrE7rPhBNVetCJTP%2BuQdscZ%2BcDBWwn271BAglqpPZ4I%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211004_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDRkMmJiOC01OTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Rk6t5APkKHRX7tmQkjEJgZr4Xy0wU1XhLZj-zins0U=&emci=d15935d9-4a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=304d2bb8-5925-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=33917617)
---
As always, thank you for your support and input.
— Adam

name: Jim DeMint
subject: A Movement For America
body:
Here at CPI, our mission is to fight back against those who want to divide our country [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c476%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zF26O9iXbftow1b%2ba3btrA&sysid=1)

Fellow Patriot:

Here at CPI, our mission is to fight back against those who want to divide our country and erase the principles and values that have made America the greatest nation in history.

We're taking action by providing resources, facilities, and staff that conservatives have never had before.

What we're building is much more than just a home for conservatism in DC. We're building a movement for what is right all across the country. It's a movement for America.

The need has never been greater. The time to act is now.

**[Please watch our new video explaining CPI's mission and share it with your family and friends.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66883%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J95lh2ARrXCbzhz3CfHS8g&sysid=1)**

Together, we can train, equip, and unite conservatives in the fight for America's future.

For Freedom,
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman

name: Collier HQ
subject: We need your help, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
We need your help, folks. Facebook shut down earlier, causing a blackout on the platform worldwide — a major source of our team’s digital outreach. That means fewer people will see Mike’s announcement to run for Lieutenant Governor of Texas and more folks will miss out on an opportunity to join our movement to defeat Dan Patrick. Our team has waited for hours for Facebook to come back online, but now we’re coming directly to you for help. We need as many folks to share Mike’s big announcement with as many people as possible. **One way you can help us do that is by sharing Mike’s launch video on Twitter. Share Mike’s vision for a stronger Texas so we can get the word out:** | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37027406/309849828/513447400?refcode=AU_MC_EG_LAU_PET_AC30_20211004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdkYmUzOC01YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDX2kzwUFYWkUbGHJK1U2ZzQOt26PVmx3eEFq2OGA0k=&emci=7a068795-5725-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=f57dbe38-5c25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7689298)
---
Since Mike doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, any amount of time we miss organizing definitely has an impact on our campaign strategy. Mike has made it clear that he will campaign like he will govern: by fighting for every vote in every county.
**If you would rather donate directly to the campaign to help us make up for the loss, you can chip into our people-powered movement today.**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37027407/309849829/1694749992?refcode=AU_MC_EG_LAU_PET_AC30_20211004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdkYmUzOC01YzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDX2kzwUFYWkUbGHJK1U2ZzQOt26PVmx3eEFq2OGA0k=)
---
Thanks for sharing our message far and wide.

clean_body: | We need your help, folks. Facebook shut down earlier, causing a blackout on the platform worldwide — a major source of our team’s digital outreach. That means fewer people will see Mike’s announcement to run for Lieutenant Governor of Texas and more folks will miss out on an opportunity to join our movement to defeat Dan Patrick. Our team has waited for hours for Facebook to come back online, but now we’re coming directly to you for help. We need as many folks to share Mike’s big announcement with as many people as possible. One way you can help us do that is by sharing Mike’s launch video on Twitter. Share Mike’s vision for a stronger Texas so we can get the word out: | Since Mike doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, any amount of time we miss organizing definitely has an impact on our campaign strategy. Mike has made it clear that he will campaign like he will govern: by fighting for every vote in every county. If you would rather donate directly to the campaign to help us make up for the loss, you can chip into our people-powered movement today. = Thanks for sharing our message far and wide. Collier HQ The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. Terms and Conditions at [21011-info.com](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=r6rcTiCaq6j7Lcgrzw4K17041lLwyHYaLS1Xg9Z7-WE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=487530171662287158&n=22).

North Carolina Republican Party, 1506 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27605, United States

clean_body: And I’m going everything I can to stop them. | Peter, I have spent the past several months traveling around North Carolina. I’ve been meeting with local leaders, grassroots activists, and elected officials to prepare our party to hold North Carolina in the Midterm Elections. One thing is absolutely clear: | | | | | | | | | | The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to seize control of our open US Senate seat, Peter. They’re desperate to win here at any cost. Just look at what they did in 2020 in South Carolina, where they raised and spent $120 million in a “deep red” state! | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Chairman Michael Whatley

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Looking for a lot of response to our October strategy survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With 2022 getting closer every day, we've got some big decisions to make about the direction of our campaign
#

Folks,
There’s a big difference between our campaign and a lot of the other ones out there:
We’re powered by a big, bold, diverse coalition of working people.
That means this campaign belongs to everyone who’s part of the team — that includes you, friend! And when you own something, your voice matters.
With 2022 getting closer every day, we've got some big decisions to make about the direction of our campaign, and we can’t make them alone.
[So we want to hear directly from you today. Will you take our short survey to share your input with the team? Your answers will help guide our October strategy over the coming weeks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37027909/309851202/2087704491?refcode2=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211004-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2MzNWVkZi01ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htcvKxIBL1QlzNdYdrJoblA79valErm-EhQceLlBYw8=&emci=07c35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=18034979)
**[BEGIN SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37027910/309851203/2087704491?refcode2=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211004-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2MzNWVkZi01ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htcvKxIBL1QlzNdYdrJoblA79valErm-EhQceLlBYw8=&emci=07c35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=18034979)**
Look, we can't sugarcoat it: This is going to be a tough race. Republicans will spend millions to hold on to this seat.
But we know we have the energy, the vision, and the people to pull this thing off. So we’re going to have to be super creative and scrappy to stand out and share Malcolm's message with as many Pennsylvanians as possible.
And we will need all of you with us every step of the way. That’s why we're hoping you’ll share your thoughts with us today.
**Please click below to begin our quick October strategy survey:**
**[BEGIN SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37027911/309851204/2087704491?refcode2=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211004-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2MzNWVkZi01ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htcvKxIBL1QlzNdYdrJoblA79valErm-EhQceLlBYw8=&emci=07c35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0cc35edf-5d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=18034979)**

Team Malcolm

body:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37028182/309852623/2029933579?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3MjEwMzZlLTVlMjUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1wm8Cds6mIrU7MyyMOox1Dn5bA_oGrGqRhPKwml7YtU=)

| | Folks, Katie Sponsler is a Democrat running in Virginia’s 66th House of Delegates District, the seat currently held by former Speaker of the House and failed gubernatorial candidate Kirk Cox. Cox, who has held this seat since 1990, ran unopposed for decades until Katie stepped up in 2017. Katie is a mom, an Air Force vet, a cancer survivor, a community activist and advocate, and she’s ready to serve her community in Richmond. **HD-66 became more and more blue during the Trump administration and we finally have the chance to flip this seat and expand our majority.** In 2019, he only won re-election with 51% of the vote. He’s seen the writing on the wall and is retiring - and this presents an opportunity for us to win this thing. **But it’s going to come down to the margins — and that’s where you come in, Derek.** **Virginia Democrats are taking action all across the Commonwealth, from Abingdon to Accomack to Arlington, and we’re running a program that we know can win and increase our majorities, but that program relies on your support and contributions.** **[That’s why we’re asking, will you chip in today to help us elect Katie and other Democrats like her?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37028273/309852900/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211004-sponsler&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDIxMDM2ZS01ZTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WtDXp8soAmX3MeEgrcitOjt6_ouxrlXfkQG2WN8tf1k=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37028551/309853606/-73891749?refcode=em-10421-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWIxMDZmZC01ZTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n27TrpyTIJm0yfDiCKZIt-jDdqL0PgwF_XHu7Mb0NWA=)
_Speaking during a recent campaign stop in Davenport._
(Photo credit: Meg McLaughlin/Quad-City Times)
Education and the quality of our public schools is an issue central to many Iowans right now, and not just because of the COVID-19 pandemic.

As ranking member of the education committee, I introduced a plan earlier this year that would strengthen our schools. It does the following: • Reduces class sizes and mandated testing
• Increases school support personnel
• Restores collective bargaining for teachers
• Stops the expansion of for-profit private and charter schools
• Enables local school boards and officials to serve communities without state overreach **This plan would make sure every kid in Iowa gets a great education.** I'm putting so much emphasis on this issue because I truly believe that what's best for our kids is what's best for our state.

On the other hand, my opponent Kim Reynolds is attempting to divert resources from public schools to fund a voucher program to send kids to private schools. It's another way for her to avoid oversight, accountability, and transparency.

**[If you're ready to continue the fight for an Iowa that works for all of us, starting with our kids -- chip in whatever you can to help me get a good start on our October fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37028552/309853607/-73891749?refcode=em-10421-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWIxMDZmZC01ZTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n27TrpyTIJm0yfDiCKZIt-jDdqL0PgwF_XHu7Mb0NWA=)**

Thanks in advance,

Ras Smith
Democrat for Governor

body:
| | | **This is not a drill.**

**House Republicans just CONFIRMED our worst fears in a recent text to their supporters. **

Take a look for yourself:
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

---

**Please understand** : Trump isn't wasting a second -- or sparing a single dollar -- in and his Republicans' his scheme to destroy our House Democrats and return to power.

_\-- Trump and his political groups have raised**$102 MILLION** this year.
\-- He and his cronies __**PURGED**_ _the GOP 's ranks of those who oppose him.
\-- And he's already endorsed 10 House Republicans._

It's clear Trump is ALL IN to defeat our House Majority and pave the way for his second term in the White House.

**So it 's on us to make sure he never even gets the chance. Here's our plan:**

****[We're calling for a HISTORIC day of Democratic grassroots fundraising -- 3,000 contributions strong -- to defend our House Majority and make Trump and his Republicans' schemes to retake power completely backfire. Can we count on you?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

Wouldn’t you prefer a pro-Trump Senate majority?
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=2b81c279e4c848f7811550e6170ee858&_e=ZdbThd9kj3pHE-BQCgeLwQ35tKcoEDUX64e9rMumajRnwz9MGOdbozbv0zYCQZQzhRdO0oSqHyYmP8fFOko-2jpgQBuOI2lt45_WZEa-D5D1JNOESUZM56HxMTNd8e2mtD356B8EL7VP4kOTuw3OLzdPlRbNQEl6ehqW0kvYkU60oZI-fBhXQI2nhJdW1oZRfEtA1x75eOpbw4MdUENk2qIDryH_KkikeoH6T9WZYpVW_QWXVR0us6ZpV6VYKtn47QFPY8ung6EPOKyOC1zZFBep6tCszgoM20iRtOIynv200dY0p80t8Husj7f2PhauKNqTOt4iTSYe9ESulgfCo31HEntCnUUjRRci4l9YbmgC8d26E1k25IUXRB_1DOZLFEBWnLS7Bjp8gMe5ie1gP-_2uZm8HzvYT1K1qjeHssx60epZM5q2wkZfc95dzbPAyNA0Y8y0ojOtcU20veWMRErGNIdLVsr_brCKqQWhERCWylC1AEzz-1B7bVkeQxZZo2b4C99eZBvOSndk0hcox-1xSGn1m2gd8LpwtibA7dk%3D)
---
Peter,
---
With Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority hanging on by just 1 seat, we must ask ourselves what a new Republican majority ought to look like.
---
We can’t be complacent with just _any_ Republican majority. We need a pro-Trump majority with the spine to fight for our conservative values -- a majority that will ALWAYS put America FIRST.
---
**That’s why I’ve remained steadfast in my decision, that after we WIN this open Senate seat needed to end Kamala’s 50-50 majority, I will __NOT__ vote for Mitch McConnell as leader. **
---
But above all else, I want to know where grassroots conservatives like YOU stand on this issue.
---

clean_body: Wouldn’t you prefer a pro-Trump Senate majority? | Peter, With Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority hanging on by just 1 seat, we must ask ourselves what a new Republican majority ought to look like. We can’t be complacent with just any Republican majority. We need a pro-Trump majority with the spine to fight for our conservative values -- a majority that will ALWAYS put America FIRST. That’s why I’ve remained steadfast in my decision, that after we WIN this open Senate seat needed to end Kamala’s 50-50 majority, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as leader. But above all else, I want to know where grassroots conservatives like YOU stand on this issue. Senate Leadership Survey: Participant: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Status:[Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 10:45 P.M. The establishment has already begun attacking me for staying true to my America First beliefs, Peter. But I refuse to fight this hard to flip the Senate just to be a part of the status quo that FAILED President Trump time and again. I wear the attacks of both the radical Left and RINOs as a badge of honor... Because the only opinions that truly matter are YOURS -- the will of the PEOPLE. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Peter,

This campaign is about fighting for Wisconsin, and here’s why it’s important that I emphasize that.

Ron Johnson has spent his entire career fighting against progress and against the needs of the people in Wisconsin. For too long, we’ve had one Senator, Tammy Baldwin, who has been working alone fighting for us while Ron Johnson promotes his conspiracy theories and radical misinformation.

I say enough is enough. We desperately need to give Senator Baldwin a new partner in the Senate, and we’re building the team that can beat Ron Johnson.

I’m ready to fight for Wisconsin and put money in the pockets of hardworking Wisconsinites who deserve a fair shot. We’ve had enough of the status quo of Senator Johnson, who only cares about his special interest mega-donors.

I’m ready to fight for Wisconsin and put money in the pockets of hardworking Wisconsinites who deserve a fair shot. name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I sent a message to Patty Murray...
body:
She’s failed Washingtonians and broken the public’s trust.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XmJDpHcpRq_oULnWzhjSoiD0hpg_PV1H6tNfVYNO566S82YFrHfEP337ItQ_-fStETlbwhePEQ7i5hGbhKfbBFzFXMQaSPIekjvm0t0mlvE4tJSJdjEZyIbdHHfkpUDH12MsG8zDvqFlXNpUgkIPXinkGOdaovBO4JU4_LYwD8t5ibjrCy3aQ9ipdDtNHR0Sb2DeYsBCBVsmyWhapOlxVVbAu6s3hC9r241Y5x15ohxWpfiZFORwfNGBsIegKBUQQHizg8SERwkGqnQ8-8N2sg==&c=yflpX7UI7icjEO5KPXbD-Wr_RWSzxRhucmPHcxh9EpBHBu6l-tEuqg==&ch=RUqZOvswwzYlWp-_dwzKJZvVZ4N8FEqwdPa-Cs3sJGN5Wf6RgMTG0A==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| Today in Washington State, homeless encampments, needle-strewn school grounds, and the threat of drugs and violence meet our children every day in far too many communities all across our great state.
For the last 30 years, Patty Murray has represented Washington in the U.S. Senate, but today's homelessness crisis is the culmination of bad policies that have been put in place during her three decades in office. Well, I sent a message to Patty Murray:
---
| "Senator Murray, I have walked through the needle infested school yards overrun by homeless encampments. As a Washingtonian, I am appalled by your abdication of the public's trust. As a mom, I am fearful for our children. And as a United States Senate candidate, I am committed to doing what you are failing to do - fight for the safety of each and every Washington State child, to ensure they can receive the education they deserve without fear of not being able to reach the classroom door."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XmJDpHcpRq_oULnWzhjSoiD0hpg_PV1H6tNfVYNO566S82YFrHfEP337ItQ_-fStETlbwhePEQ7i5hGbhKfbBFzFXMQaSPIekjvm0t0mlvE4tJSJdjEZyIbdHHfkpUDH12MsG8zDvqFlXNpUgkIPXinkGOdaovBO4JU4_LYwD8t5ibjrCy3aQ9ipdDtNHR0Sb2DeYsBCBVsmyWhapOlxVVbAu6s3hC9r241Y5x15ohxWpfiZFORwfNGBsIegKBUQQHizg8SERwkGqnQ8-8N2sg==&c=yflpX7UI7icjEO5KPXbD-Wr_RWSzxRhucmPHcxh9EpBHBu6l-tEuqg==&ch=RUqZOvswwzYlWp-_dwzKJZvVZ4N8FEqwdPa-Cs3sJGN5Wf6RgMTG0A==)
---
| Last week an organization armed with volunteers cleaned up a 15-acre homeless encampment in Everett and collected over 10,000 used needles left scattered on the ground and hanging from the trees. The conditions of our city's streets, parks, and even areas surrounding schools aren't healthy or safe for anyone. There are hundreds of individuals and organizations around our state pouring out their hearts to help our homeless community and to keep our state safe and healthy - what we need is a strong leader who is ready to bring these efforts together and tackle this problem head on.
Help me send a message to Patty Murray. We won't be silent and we won't stop fighting for the safety and well-being of our children, and all of Washington's citizens.
[If you agree, please sign my petition!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XmJDpHcpRq_oULnWzhjSoiD0hpg_PV1H6tNfVYNO566S82YFrHfEP337ItQ_-fStETlbwhePEQ7i5hGbhKfbBFzFXMQaSPIekjvm0t0mlvE4tJSJdjEZyIbdHHfkpUDH12MsG8zDvqFlXNpUgkIPXinkGOdaovBO4JU4_LYwD8t5ibjrCy3aQ9ipdDtNHR0Sb2DeYsBCBVsmyWhapOlxVVbAu6s3hC9r241Y5x15ohxWpfiZFORwfNGBsIegKBUQQHizg8SERwkGqnQ8-8N2sg==&c=yflpX7UI7icjEO5KPXbD-Wr_RWSzxRhucmPHcxh9EpBHBu6l-tEuqg==&ch=RUqZOvswwzYlWp-_dwzKJZvVZ4N8FEqwdPa-Cs3sJGN5Wf6RgMTG0A==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XmJDpHcpRq_oULnWzhjSoiD0hpg_PV1H6tNfVYNO566S82YFrHfEP337ItQ_-fStETlbwhePEQ7i5hGbhKfbBFzFXMQaSPIekjvm0t0mlvE4tJSJdjEZyIbdHHfkpUDH12MsG8zDvqFlXNpUgkIPXinkGOdaovBO4JU4_LYwD8t5ibjrCy3aQ9ipdDtNHR0Sb2DeYsBCBVsmyWhapOlxVVbAu6s3hC9r241Y5x15ohxWpfiZFORwfNGBsIegKBUQQHizg8SERwkGqnQ8-8N2sg==&c=yflpX7UI7icjEO5KPXbD-Wr_RWSzxRhucmPHcxh9EpBHBu6l-tEuqg==&ch=RUqZOvswwzYlWp-_dwzKJZvVZ4N8FEqwdPa-Cs3sJGN5Wf6RgMTG0A==)
---
| Thank you,
Team Smiley
---
| PS: If you haven't already signed up to receive regular updates from our campaign please [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XmJDpHcpRq_oULnWzhjSoiD0hpg_PV1H6tNfVYNO566S82YFrHfEP2Zqyill_nEni4tmbWS1gnC-2xXJYRy9WynEpv9-0nRQ0_qxIlP6JCC9Y5BsDbeFvRFU2cQGETQTPSKg4l1zS-Q97ts1Ch1fmMIw_IXNR9NW_KMh7F7Hoq4XMqrIjWIT4KSETsWkBEMaajvLvvBVEHucC_4DrelfQT8RaD7FqxPP2U1P-gFBY8A=&c=yflpX7UI7icjEO5KPXbD-Wr_RWSzxRhucmPHcxh9EpBHBu6l-tEuqg==&ch=RUqZOvswwzYlWp-_dwzKJZvVZ4N8FEqwdPa-Cs3sJGN5Wf6RgMTG0A==) to follow along!

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Marching for women and for choice
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

On Saturday, I proudly marched with women across South Florida at the Broward County Women’s March.

This year’s event was more important than ever: with Republicans in the Legislature following Texas’ lead on anti-choice legislation, we need to do all that we can to fight back.

Here’s my promise to you: as the only lifelong pro-choice candidate running for Governor, I will fight like hell and veto any anti-choice legislation that comes across my desk.

Florida’s rigged system has enabled anti-choice politicians for decades. Year after year, politicians attack our right to an abortion, our right to vote, our right to protest, and so much more.

It’s time to break the system. It’s time for Florida’s first woman governor.

Thanks for fighting by my side on this. We couldn’t do it without you.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

subject: New Ad: Laura Schools Joe
body:
I told everyone I wouldn’t be holding back this year . . . and my newest ad is just the start.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e8GyLyCfxJANxvCebaXnog/AgHeaCdCeiQfUTvkot6zEw)
Patriot,

I told everyone I wouldn’t be holding back this year . . . **and my newest ad is just the start**.

[**Watch and help me air this ad:**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e8GyLyCfxJANxvCebaXnog/AgHeaCdCeiQfUTvkot6zEw)

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e8GyLyCfxJANxvCebaXnog/AgHeaCdCeiQfUTvkot6zEw)
My Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster, WOULD NEVER air an ad like this, or even speak out about the threat Radical Islam poses to our Constitutional values and our education system.

As a matter of fact, on the 20th anniversary of 911, Webster blamed **the Taliban** for attacking us that day . . . which is just mind-boggling dumb.

It’s dumb, because as a sitting member of Congress with voting power, Webster should know al-Qaeda, NOT the Taliban, killed 2,981 people on September 11th.

And twenty years later, as part of the Democrats’ growing Critical Race Theory agenda, **Joe Biden wants to teach our school children about the “Islamic faith” while ignoring the ongoing war that Jihadis have been waging against the West for decades!**

And sadly, Democrats and Do-Nothing Republicans go right along with the Biden Regime’s agenda to normalize Sharia Law and Islamic “traditions” that include religious bigotry, violence, spousal abuse, sexism, racism and homophobia.

Do you want a member of Congress who speaks the truth about Islam or hides their head in the sand?

You know where I stand, and if you agree, [**watch this ad, share it, and help me air it**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/e8GyLyCfxJANxvCebaXnog/AgHeaCdCeiQfUTvkot6zEw).

Thanks so much,

Laura Loomer

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Fighting the far-left’s education takeover
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature are fighting back against the far-left’s attempts to launch a liberal takeover of our education system. [**Read: Legislature takes on radical curriculum**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwC80RLENPsfpnbSffvASA-Q-VGxT2TGOIexCV86yRS-cy_SzRl8IkZFvgIvoX0d_krkiMlBw-zUy6ORSjCycxiw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=2)****[**
**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwC80RLENPsfpnbSffvASA-Q-VGxT2TGOIexCV86yRS-cy_SzRl8IkZFvgIvoX0d_krkiMlBw-zUy6ORSjCycxiw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=3) While Democrats fight for closed schools and divisive curriculum like critical race theory, Republicans are fighting for transparency in education. Last week, key education bills made their way through the Legislature, including ones that focus on:
* Curriculum transparency for families
* Teaching civics to students
* Prohibiting divisive critical race theory curriculum in the classroom
* Fiscal transparency for taxpayer-funded schools

Republicans are taking action on education while Tony Evers continues to fail. While Republicans delivered billions of dollars in education [**increases**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=a9lVzACUQtvW78T1Y1IgXSTAWhYy73r-ZfSkFnsT9TFdGLN737uaeYvVUckFECcusS1ZZWJEA-4PAD4jDC3wWAbyA62dtWSUjsnHK1v7_lVdjckM73i6qjWQUwAmVAnInvOSFNuiWgr6q_IzM23Qag&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=4) this year, Democrats like Tony Evers and Joe Biden have fought to keep schools closed, enlisted [**teachers unions**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=fraD4z7fIK2NRjL1rgceGkQV2QmtftICOcRxlJwuTk5D2z9WTJ7Ng8l8jpbauQHP0xwogUtxv0ubOH0_N129Q0hyvQnP__w9lOKcm7fsphxha1RCvsZTfpszI8-d5MzT&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=5) to write schools reopening guidance, and promoted divisive curriculum at our childrens’ expense. Republicans will always put students and families -- not special interests and union bosses -- first. You can read more about the Legislature’s bills in Empower Wisconsin [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwC80RLENPsfpnbSffvASA-Q-VGxT2TGOIexCV86yRS-cy_SzRl8IkZFvgIvoX0d_krkiMlBw-zUy6ORSjCycxiw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_takeover_v3&n=6). Peter, October is LGBTQ+ History Month.

As a gay man, I am keenly aware of the many activists throughout US history who have sacrificed everything just so people like me could enjoy basic human rights:
* The right to love who we choose
* The right to protection from violence and discrimination
* The right to live freely without hiding our identities
* And so much more

In honor of these brave and courageous individuals, I am committed to continuing the fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity. And as Republicans work to undermine our community across state legislatures, this fight has never been more important.

[**But Peter -- I can’t do this without you. So I’m asking: Can I count on you to chip in $3 to join my fight for LGBTQ+ communities and stand up for marginalized people everywhere? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37032253/309863536/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlNjYxNS02ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGH1AyH7abjYPHDD7ZjjZwyDZzWlmvxk-6CCxe-nKUw=&emci=e8a6f554-5e25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=52de6615-6d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12666102)

| | Peter,

As a pediatrician, I had to tell a 14-year old that her chronic stomach aches were actually a pregnancy. I was able to give her options because, in Colorado, we still have options.

**But now those options are under threat.**

Texas just passed the most restrictive abortion ban in recent memory, and Republican legislatures across the country are following suit. **[Together we can fight back — add your name and demand the Senate pass the Women’s Health Protection Act of 2021 to protect the right to choose >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37032254/309863537/-263094840?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlNjYxNS02ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGH1AyH7abjYPHDD7ZjjZwyDZzWlmvxk-6CCxe-nKUw=&emci=e8a6f554-5e25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=52de6615-6d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12666102)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37032255/309863538/-263094840?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlNjYxNS02ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGH1AyH7abjYPHDD7ZjjZwyDZzWlmvxk-6CCxe-nKUw=&emci=e8a6f554-5e25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=52de6615-6d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12666102)****
---
When I’m in Congress, I will work to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and guarantee that every single pregnant person has access to abortion and proper reproductive health care.

But this is an issue that cannot wait until then — we need to take action now. The House just passed the Women’s Health Protection Act (WHPA) of 2021 to combat these Republican attacks on reproductive rights. The WHPA would protect a person’s right to an abortion and a health care provider’s ability to provide abortion services.

This legislation is critical to protecting constitutional, reproductive rights nationwide. But it has only passed the House — it still needs to pass the Senate. To get the Senate to budge, we’re going to need a groundswell of grassroots pressure. **[Can I count on you, Peter? I need 5,000 signatures on my petition demanding the Senate pass the WHPA and protect reproductive health care across the country >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37032256/309863539/-263094840?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlNjYxNS02ZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGH1AyH7abjYPHDD7ZjjZwyDZzWlmvxk-6CCxe-nKUw=&emci=e8a6f554-5e25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=52de6615-6d25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12666102)**

Thanks to so many Democrats stepping up to retire MAGA Ken Calvert, **we not only reached but exceeded our end-of-quarter goal.**

| | Look, Derek, I know hitting a $500,000 goal in three days is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I just asked my team if anyone even reads these emails.

If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump 4 times.

They’ll also know that _The Cook Political Report_ recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.”

Not to mention experts from _POLITICO_ to _The Washington Post_ are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win.

name: Donna Imam
subject: Democrats have the majority. Now voters expect results.
body:
President Biden: "I need 50 votes in the Senate. I have 48." |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37033765/309876311/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTlhMDA5Yy03MzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jMPkYOoTEunP5W1iGlPNHhjGv_W0C_ATHcpPZp6zJjw=)
Team,

**The Democratic majorities in Congress are very slim right now,_but they are majorities._ Voters handed Democrats the House, Senate, and the While House. They expect results.**

There's no debate that the COVID-19 pandemic hit working families the hardest. Millions of Americans lost jobs, income, healthcare, and childcare. The Texas GOP reacted by taking away federal unemployment benefits from the most vulnerable in our communities.

With so much at stake, Democrats need to use their majority in Congress to move the country forward out of the pandemic. Instead, President Biden has been forced to publicly acknowledge that he only has 48 votes in the Senate.

We’ve seen this play out before after the public option was stripped from the Affordable Care Act before the 2010 midterms when Democrats suffered near record losses in the House. If Democrats don't pass Biden's Build Back Better Agenda -- which would make the expanded child tax credits permanent, institute universal pre-K, tuition-free community college, expand Medicare, and mitigate the worst impacts of our climate crisis -- **we'll face the same fate in 2022.**

It’s up to us on the ground in Texas to ensure voters are aware of what I'll fight for in Washington. We must stand with working families against corporate interests. With your help, our campaign will take this economic message directly to voters' doors here in Austin.

[**If you want to support someone who will go to Congress as a champion of working families -- you don't have to look any further. Chip in $3 today to help me get a good start on our October fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37033766/309876312/1898666321?refcode=em-10421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTlhMDA5Yy03MzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jMPkYOoTEunP5W1iGlPNHhjGv_W0C_ATHcpPZp6zJjw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37033767/309876313/1898666321?refcode=em-10421-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTlhMDA5Yy03MzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jMPkYOoTEunP5W1iGlPNHhjGv_W0C_ATHcpPZp6zJjw=)

clean_body: President Biden: "I need 50 votes in the Senate. I have 48." | = Team, The Democratic majorities in Congress are very slim right now,but they are majorities. Voters handed Democrats the House, Senate, and the While House. They expect results. There's no debate that the COVID-19 pandemic hit working families the hardest. Millions of Americans lost jobs, income, healthcare, and childcare. The Texas GOP reacted by taking away federal unemployment benefits from the most vulnerable in our communities. With so much at stake, Democrats need to use their majority in Congress to move the country forward out of the pandemic. Instead, President Biden has been forced to publicly acknowledge that he only has 48 votes in the Senate. We’ve seen this play out before after the public option was stripped from the Affordable Care Act before the 2010 midterms when Democrats suffered near record losses in the House. If Democrats don't pass Biden's Build Back Better Agenda -- which would make the expanded child tax credits permanent, institute universal pre-K, tuition-free community college, expand Medicare, and mitigate the worst impacts of our climate crisis -- we'll face the same fate in 2022.
