name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: "Sinema leaves DC for high-end corporate fundraiser as she blocks Biden spending bill"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Right now, some Democratic senators are choosing to stall President Biden's agenda.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211004-2887-header&t=1&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)
Peter,
We talk to you *a lot* about this campaign being a true grassroots, people-powered effort to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate. Here's a big reason why:
As you read this, some _< checks notes>_ Democratic senators are choosing to stall President Biden's agenda...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32341?refcode=em20211004-2887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)
**John Fetterman believes that Democrats should vote like Democrats. It's as simple as that.** He's said loud and clear that, if elected to the Senate, he will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator. Instead, he'd proudly cast that 51st vote Democrats need to finally pass Biden's agenda and prioritize working families across our Commonwealth.
John will always be accountable to you, Peter — not shady funders or special interests — which is why he's *outright refused* to accept a cent from corporate PACs. **Which, by default, makes online donations through emails like this one allllll the more important.**[**_If you believe we need more Democrats who actually will vote like Democrats in the U.S. Senate, will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help elect John Fetterman right now?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32341?refcode=em20211004-2887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32341?refcode=em20211004-2887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)**
Nowadays, a lot of campaigns try to make claims that they're all about the grassroots, etc. But John Fetterman actually has the team to back it up. He's got you, Peter.
In the Q3 fundraising quarter that just wrapped up, we were able to raise $2.69 MILLION from over 94,000 donations — **99% of donations coming from grassroots folks chipping in small amounts at a time.**
Every county, every vote is a hell of a lot more than just a slogan. John and Gisele are especially grateful that our campaign has received contributions from over 87% of Pennsylvania ZIP codes.
_Plus, the most common occupation of donors to John Fetterman is teacher. FWIW, we think that says a lot._
We're sharing all of this with you because YOU made this happen — not corporate funders or shady super PACs trying to buy this open Senate seat. John's proud to be running this race the right way, but he'll need all the support he can get if we're going to keep up our momentum and continue the hard work of building a campaign that will flip this seat blue.
[**_If it makes sense for your budget, will you make your first $5 donation to our true grassroots campaign? We're proud NOT to be funded by corporate funders and PACs — so we're really counting on a lot of folks from Cresco to build a campaign that can win._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32341?refcode=em20211004-2887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32341?refcode=em20211004-2887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)**
Thank you so much for all that you do. We hope you're proud of all that you have done to make this the #1 most grassroots campaign in Pennsylvania.
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211004-2887-footer&t=25&refcode2=2887_434096_cOPFjy&akid=2887%2E434096%2EcOPFjy)**
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What I told Dana Bash on CNN yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re not going to allow corporations to cut trillions of dollars from President Biden’s Build Back Better Act.
#
Peter,
Cutting President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act by $2 trillion would mean cutting long-overdue investments in paid leave, childcare, health care, climate action, housing, and education.
That’s why on CNN this weekend, I told Dana Bash that slashing the investments that working people, families, and our communities need by $2 trillion is not going to happen.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7358?refcode=em20211004-694&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=694%2E420207%2ExzlucI)
The topline number does not come out of thin air. We didn’t pick it out of a hat. It comes from the important priorities that President Biden outlined before Congress more than five months ago. It comes from the priorities that we all promised people when they gave us the House, the Senate, and the White House.
And look, we know exactly who is trying to slash away Democratic priorities: Corporate America. They want us to make these “wrenching” choices:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7358?refcode=em20211004-694&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=694%2E420207%2ExzlucI)
The people did not elect us so we could choose between providing health care OR child care, addressing homelessness OR climate change. **Peter, we need to deliver economic relief for people in this country AND we need to fight climate change.**
[**Corporations will do everything they can to slash the Build Back Better Act and avoid paying their fair share in taxes. I’m fighting back, because Democrats must act for the people — not Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the fossil fuel industry. Can you chip in $3 to fuel my fight, Peter? We will deliver for the people, no matter how hard corporate America and Big Pharma tries to stop us.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7358?refcode=em20211004-694&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=694%2E420207%2ExzlucI)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7358?refcode=em20211004-694&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=694%2E420207%2ExzlucI)**
As our urgent work continues, I’m so glad to have you with me in this fight.
In solidarity,
Pramila

clean_body: We’re not going to allow corporations to cut trillions of dollars from President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. Peter, Cutting President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act by $2 trillion would mean cutting long-overdue investments in paid leave, childcare, health care, climate action, housing, and education. That’s why on CNN this weekend, I told Dana Bash that slashing the investments that working people, families, and our communities need by $2 trillion is not going to happen. The topline number does not come out of thin air. We didn’t pick it out of a hat. It comes from the important priorities that President Biden outlined before Congress more than five months ago. It comes from the priorities that we all promised people when they gave us the House, the Senate, and the White House. And look, we know exactly who is trying to slash away Democratic priorities: Corporate America. They want us to make these “wrenching” choices: The people did not elect us so we could choose between providing health care OR child care, addressing homelessness OR climate change. Peter, we need to deliver economic relief for people in this country AND we need to fight climate change. As our urgent work continues, I’m so glad to have you with me in this fight. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan=20Hess=2C=20Senior=20Advisor?=
subject: Virtual Volunteers Needed This Week!
body:
Today is the LAST DAY TO REGISTER TO VOTE ⏰ | | | |
---
| | | _Hey -- Today is the final day to register to vote in Ohio. Can you take 2 minutes right now to**text 10 friends the following message:**_
---
| | _Hey! Today is the**last day** to register to vote in the 2021 special election, and I want to make sure all of my friends are ready to cast a ballot this Nov. 2! You can check or update your voter registration at [https://olvr.ohiosos.gov/](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c8b0bb3c9e&e=400a181d5a). Let me know when you're registered!_
---
|
---
|
---
| Hi ,

Voting in the 2021 Special Election begins **_tomorrow_**. We have just 29 days left to flip the 15th and send Allison to Congress. There is no time to wait, and we need all hands on deck to make this happen!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=40a113828a&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Text Voters about the first day of early voting!](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=069d01f524&e=400a181d5a)
We’re texting 2021 special election voters to let them know that early voting begins on Oct. 5th! With just a computer or smartphone, you can help us text voters in every corner of the district. No app or personal phone number required! We'll be on Zoom for camaraderie, troubleshooting, and discussing the special election!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3af43f9b86&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Rural Voters for Allison Russo Phone Bank](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2710cd2b6c&e=400a181d5a)
Make calls with Rural Voters for Russo and United Rural Democrats about the upcoming OH-15 special election! We have a mission: reach out to the folks who share our values in every corner of this district. Every Monday and Wednesday evening, we hold Zoom training sessions for first-time Russo phone bankers. Once you have gone through this training and have all the materials you'll need, you are welcome to make calls throughout the week, Monday-Friday from 4pm-8:30pm.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a57631fb1a&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Seniors for Allison Russo Phone Bank](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7918f1d823&e=400a181d5a)
Make calls with Seniors for Russo about the upcoming OH-15 special election! This phone bank targets senior voters who haven't yet made up their mind about the upcoming election. Every Tuesday and Thursday evening, we hold Zoom training sessions for first-time Russo phone bankers. Once you have gone through this training and have all the materials you'll need, you are welcome to make calls throughout the week, Monday-Friday from 4pm-8:30pm.

|
### _FEATURED IN-DISTRICT EVENTS THIS WEEK:_
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0d85d85576&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Ohio AFL-CIO Day of Action, Oct. 9th](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c91e258dc5&e=400a181d5a)
Join your brothers and sisters in the Ohio AFL-CIO for a district-wide Day of Action in support of Allison Russo! _All allies of labor welcome!_
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e8fb6dcd88&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Knock on Doors with Mayor Nan Whaley](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=85f9a304d8&e=400a181d5a)
Join us this Sunday, Oct. 10th at 11:30am to hear from special guest Mayor Nan Whaley to knock on doors and talk to our neighbors about the special election for Ohio’s 15th Congressional district.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c6dbee9a28&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [VMC Canvass with Mayor Steve Patterson](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2529f10314&e=400a181d5a)
Join us this Sunday, Oct. 10th at 2pm to hear from Veteran and Athens Mayor Steve Patterson and fellow before we knock on doors and talk with voters on behalf of Allison Russo. _All allies welcome!_
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=792192ce84&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f314a3eb4c&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=aba0881f85&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fb625dcdeb&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7e78070163&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e6d142f6c2&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ff35b7fa8f&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4454addef2&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6733aa82b6&e=400a181d5a) | [Nelsonville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d4a3248e23&e=400a181d5a) | [Grandview](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b33677bd50&e=400a181d5a)
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f753cf2dd9&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")

| |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: CNN is trying to tank my campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a48033f2887e4a25b84050dcf4f37137&_e=PBNmjEsdU4MCPtaU-vmMqJIv2trQCJXkDe4V1NmKbNvxPoE30bg3S7FHts4L8KykEAeKjxnqI-WX-zMHdLHIqM9IMzd9vP3JuSyGdaJc5qlfIETgqpJAtyIqU1kvk_MCD04PaDPcNgKErvKRY_x5Mu4_MCKA2nV5NLuZ65az78OMkcVlfJ1beUfz9p5ITXaIYMuXYQ4jshmRUTwZZZgXk1dRA0EAIcLMbXG22g4Uo97nBNfRQ3j6y_YMZAeSC_G6vUrnSmV5BfcLkKMkelWuKf8_JvRbt8ATHcB6A6fAtUeNBQ7ZiaxeRnQDUOVjOvzQfDYVaaKp8d9707YzqWxHzaKOq8_d1FL9XhXQYichI7jNHWdj4saacJtPw-oLwSz4jIAB-kg02Aec7HoRoavDB751DgEo-YkGOsTdPeppWosQB0CmYb0M6JgS9rpiezVkPBghKzPquYTI0p07yXOleN0VAYZVBAhaceH7hyXSTlA%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a48033f2887e4a25b84050dcf4f37137&_e=PBNmjEsdU4MCPtaU-vmMqJIv2trQCJXkDe4V1NmKbNvxPoE30bg3S7FHts4L8KykEAeKjxnqI-WX-zMHdLHIqM9IMzd9vP3JuSyGdaJc5qlfIETgqpJAtyIqU1kvk_MCD04PaDPcNgKErvKRY_x5Mu4_MCKA2nV5NLuZ65az78OMkcVlfJ1beUfz9p5ITXaIYMuXYQ4jshmRUTwZZZgXk1dRA0EAIcLMbXG22g4Uo97nBNfRQ3j6y_YMZAeSC_G6vUrnSmV5BfcLkKMkelWuKWQSt0Pzz0NvQOmnDfyVheb3ifJ2nSuZSSuohE7DleG-FfvwP8oGrZO1nW-7GHHAW6eR3wEqDjKploSmIAEkS7eIwMREQeo82IJ49H0gufhuGrBdGl_klliIB8Kp8LgVUxJCBPFTX08AujhuvC_f8jlMR9mERqONq0ka1ISN4qaUhLoiTGu1mMqFfVpBsGUelY4Uvge_JunEvIZaQ4Kg_ZA%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a48033f2887e4a25b84050dcf4f37137&_e=PBNmjEsdU4MCPtaU-vmMqJIv2trQCJXkDe4V1NmKbNvxPoE30bg3S7FHts4L8KykEAeKjxnqI-WX-zMHdLHIqM9IMzd9vP3JuSyGdaJc5qlfIETgqpJAtyIqU1kvk_MCD04PaDPcNgKErvKRY_x5Mu4_MCKA2nV5NLuZ65az78OMkcVlfJ1beUfz9p5ITXaIYMuXYQ4jshmRUTwZZZgXk1dRA0EAIcLMbXG22g4Uo97nBNfRQ3j6y_YMZAeSC_G6vUrnSmV5BfcLkKMkelWuKWGEm6rGef1-PD2vHBW-G480eMYwwaaePvIedTVDQ_A5nAkrajvmLIJ6IsDqZdmOsZI72KvuFbnmXikr22niSPnDF13ZvT5Q6UZIDmbR-7vdu94_RJ2V1XeVwalS03UnirbvexLDWPDIgI2yCEMGNOL7ld5aun951Ns7NZFTMzgtV_Aouyu8rtYIXyZfSJx0YeUnaZnNBOr7oUpvdWB9tSI%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a48033f2887e4a25b84050dcf4f37137&_e=PBNmjEsdU4MCPtaU-vmMqJIv2trQCJXkDe4V1NmKbNvxPoE30bg3S7FHts4L8KykEAeKjxnqI-WX-zMHdLHIqM9IMzd9vP3JuSyGdaJc5qlfIETgqpJAtyIqU1kvk_MCD04PaDPcNgKErvKRY_x5Mu4_MCKA2nV5NLuZ65az78OMkcVlfJ1beUfz9p5ITXaIYMuXYQ4jshmRUTwZZZgXk1dRA0EAIcLMbXG22g4Uo97nBNfRQ3j6y_YMZAeSC_G6vUrnSmV5BfcLkKMkelWuKeuMsmIdP_5CD-wzX6LdBk6W1y0ehLhzTNASCi0JtaAAgl4wv1OBpU6Ioxqg27dqRZPAEDArut233Jk-gyLH3PR2VXt-L8jS-pcdpbRGf5NB5OcwnGAebcsHfu8BT6w0H7p5RCgXPKws5_qmi5XYtHdvTAY0u71yw1p4IsGg0Xy5DjSpUCIqm8BR0QBqG1VpCRfTX8PdoAH74WwwtA4-RLI%3D)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a48033f2887e4a25b84050dcf4f37137&_e=PBNmjEsdU4MCPtaU-vmMqJIv2trQCJXkDe4V1NmKbNvxPoE30bg3S7FHts4L8KykEAeKjxnqI-WX-zMHdLHIqM9IMzd9vP3JuSyGdaJc5qlfIETgqpJAtyIqU1kvk_MCD04PaDPcNgKErvKRY_x5Mu4_MCKA2nV5NLuZ65az78OMkcVlfJ1beUfz9p5ITXaIYMuXYQ4jshmRUTwZZZgXk1dRA0EAIcLMbXG22g4Uo97nBNfRQ3j6y_YMZAeSC_G6vUrnSmV5BfcLkKMkelWuKTbwtsgWXrTdLVIPleEnvb8JzBHzB8heth7P94PtB5O9aBpWQwzDQTqjYdutY-qn6o4NTaEWurCtrHaaD09zEVmarLGi6_Em7P1JKfzoYa3EUsYIUYOhhEdsKwxRPU0GEcJzqfMWDAnITj69i1EAS5r7-5V41MOm9zMkK71gTYEWsQAHT59a9I1_Guc4VlqDCbDUxdoORju-vG22igfqIB0%3D)
Herschel Walker

When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This short survey is your chance to share your thoughts directly with Erica.
#
We’re so proud of the diverse, working-class coalition we’re building to win progressive change in North Carolina and expand our narrow majority in the U.S. Senate.
Your support in this fight means everything to Erica and our team, and we want you to truly be part of this movement. That’s why today, we’re checking in with grassroots supporters like you to hear what’s on your mind.
**This short survey is your chance to share your thoughts and priorities for this campaign for U.S. Senate directly with Erica.[Will you take our survey and share what issues you want Erica to focus on?](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211004-survey/?source=em20211004-520&t=1&akid=520%2E3698%2EJpu-Y6)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211004-survey/?source=em20211004-520&t=2&akid=520%2E3698%2EJpu-Y6)**
We’re always going to keep it 100% real with you; the truth is that this is going to be a tough race. We’re up against a crowded and competitive field of candidates — that means getting our bold, progressive message out will be even more challenging from here on out.
So, we need your help. [**Please take a minute to share your thoughts with us by taking our short survey so we can build the strongest campaign possible.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211004-survey/?source=em20211004-520&t=3&akid=520%2E3698%2EJpu-Y6)
We’ve got some big decisions to make for our campaign, and we want to know where you’re at before we finalize our plan for the next phase of this race.
Thanks so much, and we can’t wait to read your feedback!
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211004-520-footer&t=4&refcode2=520_3698_Jpu-Y6&akid=520%2E3698%2EJpu-Y6)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Ask him yourself at the Virtual Townhall with Ammon Bundy - October 12th, 7PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| **The Ammon Bundy for Governor Campaign is Hosting a Virtual Townhall - Oct. 12th, 7 PM**
**Have you ever wanted to ask a leading governor candidate a question? What about Ammon Bundy?** Here is your chance to ask him anything you want! How about asking him what he thinks about law enforcement or his position on immigration? You know he did not see eye to eye with Trump on immigration or the COVID shot. __So_ _here is your chance to pin him down and get answers from the horse's mouth_._ Ammon has been leading in the polls and may just be your next Governor. __Don't let this opportunity to directly interact with him pass you by.__ **Besides your questions, during this Virtual Townhall,****Ammon will be discussing the eliminating of property tax, correcting the affordable housing crisis, taking back Idaho's land from the federal government, amending the education system in Idaho and defending Idahoans from unconstitutional mandates.** _It is the state's job (including the governor) to protect the people's rights, correct?_ _Find out how Ammon plans on doing this._ If you don't want to ask a question but want to know how Ammon plans on making Idaho a place of refuge for those who wish to live free then tune in as well! **Remember you have to register to participate in the Virtual Townhall with Ammon Bundy**. Here is the link to get registered TODAY so you can participate and really drill Ammon with your question:[ https://www.votebundy.com/live/](https://www.votebundy.com/live/)
[
](https://www.votebundy.com/live/)

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). name: Eva Black, Nevada
subject: Facebook AND Instagram are down...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhkRCb1IEUbKN0NGVinwHycy0zhZnNHb8-fCzX4KtoZFGA_VpLRnIRhMPfGNA71gJxNjGsrkCGxyOUTEN2Td5Lnm68gOazhpXZoD3VqG2_-B1Ucb9YGsrkmV7OQYbyn-YsHWnPABs62z4JjpP-VRVCD9szkImgNCJhXkXJA-WAuHpIGXr0cxEY5LBx1WkyApoTrLXdBdwFTSOFMRQTyXJuEIQDxWALg8FgMAJ8VC2NWi_iN6FV5FCmXMt9MKwf1AwCRl740WrnfBQPhGXit1xehmFFWJv4SxXGm0CF7uw9Wpcngbqepb7EXp2lMUHDRPAJlEKOyK8hASnOy4jQXzLuVFDH0RA_8t23YTS-SRekOg/3fv/k0wxetPfSqKJSh8rAdjsAA/h0/KzEGmp3X5GSLp1m7RkFn0h5-ibWUcyijYVRWoQb_Yg0)
| | Team, digital advertising is critical for our campaign. **Grassroots donations from Facebook and Instagram account for more than 60% of this month’s online fundraising goal.** And as you’ve probably heard by now, _both platforms are down -- leaving us in an advertising blackout._ Steve’s 5th Republican opponent just announced and the polls are already showing them neck and neck. Our grassroots fundraising will be what makes or breaks the outcome of this race, so we’ve got zero room to fall behind. body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FpZg4D0aXtpnKuefXtxjYj358m7fLHPpr90R-na9CuebX7apZyCMbma2rUhDeKZO7XKTPqAYYzAdEtM-OUJ2TFOjJQWOMfw0LMQO-NxareVUNN91G0tlj6smSuJTWqO7JaczNghXqgJGM9fmbOWZ-Cdev9h38q1wdfTCEhjDKJeHR2ckZLchB6l1-25nc8lNjwKXHMTqwgufFzFcrIbFKNfTelEePj4RJ0pjPrQglAGAarNByq-q4C9Lx3SBG2A0APC-YUrwhzPl9RBUp_1ZctuwdLWstsJ6YjxL7lZDHQ4N/3fv/hI4m_XHXQPSDSvjFPsmt4A/h0/v76Q0-42BoVx7pFiXnq5k3ni4sJNTtOWoQb-kJLmdDY)
Derek —

I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

**One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal.

That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back.

**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

**[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FoEYdk58nH-JPPsiyOn6cqIsw6QXJJarODsJ7p10OGyTVxH1qvyEUAiEoZpJHOTiADwwEvvLWOZDkhR0GGKDiyOA-GZ2y2LqgasThtjBqpqoSI0bA68t7vhKpe87XI_2giSKlgmJrvMmcbH_lVgWOW6iEHSKDEkepVDRmumw0eEBjzIhaQVoF_niq3Td1bt_N-QoPsCPC1EImmoY8-uiGAWboMskRI_aoOagH9PqWyIO7yDLDe9O6v16O-_lhfFnMKEw6r3z_G1D9FTtn24D83fH1nRL2ewc2eqIFUKvI91e/3fv/hI4m_XHXQPSDSvjFPsmt4A/h1/olTNYXUS7MMRU0hFp1OwbhS9aolEZVVt3dzPpZujw-o)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FoEYdk58nH-JPPsiyOn6cqIsw6QXJJarODsJ7p10OGyTJ37WLPCpA941c6LcoXiCtgLpaVaogIygrbnIhtpVbsd7i9koU5VmhaU3M1PO8lAjH_0bJd6LGX2Ke6haD-L79jJO12zkPtSugy4yU5InrOKaeFHaDmo0v3rwc4tj5PoumOwoQ2NAg-KFoWdtrCzJblKmTkJfrVEtY2q14Y81773TrLjkynfuvaX3cGUCn7ey6WeKWRd5KMywMolFbngmy2UwCiEe7k_1Baxja6bPC-Qdf8WJzH2Xp5W80d5_RZjr/3fv/hI4m_XHXQPSDSvjFPsmt4A/h2/RXZWjoVmXFeHdtekieU4zGFFxk517FQ72fEBWynX7X0)

clean_body: | | | Derek — I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022. We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, — Mark | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Lawsuit Sues Justice Department for Records About Killing of Ashli Babbitt
body:
Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United State Capitol. She was unarmed, and a 14-year Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by Congress as well as federal and local authorities for eight months until U.S. Capitol Police officer Michael Byrd went public to try to defend his killing of Ms. Babbitt.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 4, 2021

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56803&L=25973&F=H&) | **[U.S. Gives “Immigrant-Serving Organizations” $10 Mil Under Obama Assimilation Program](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56803&L=25973&F=H&)** The U.S. government continues funding a costly initiative established by former President Barack Obama to offer foreigners free English, history, and civics courses as well as naturalization legal services. The money flows through U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), the Homeland Security agency with a staff of around 19,000 that oversees lawful immigration. Launched in 2009, the program aims to expand citizenship preparation services nationwide by annually awarding thousands of dollars to a multitude of leftist groups described by the government as “immigrant-serving organizations” in dozens of states and the District of Columbia. Sussmann, Fitton notes, “was behind the idea that a Russian bank had improper communications ... with the Trump organization.” However, “he was not indicted for lying about that specifically,” Fitton explains, “he lied about the purpose of the meeting.” According to the indictment, “he withheld from [General Counsel] Baker ... that he was there on behalf of Hillary Clinton, the Clinton campaign, the Democratic National Committee, etc..” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56803&L=25978&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2NsaW50b24tY3JpbWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDQyMTQwMzM=)

clean_body: Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United State Capitol. She was unarmed, and a 14-year Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by Congress as well as federal and local authorities for eight months until U.S. Capitol Police officer Michael Byrd went public to try to defend his killing of Ms. Babbitt. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 4, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United State Capitol. She was unarmed, and a 14-year Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by Congress as well as federal and local authorities for eight months until U.S. Capitol Police officer Michael Byrd went public to try to defend his killing of Ms. Babbitt. ---|--- | | | | == | == The HHS website describes the COVID-19 Community Corps as “an initiative to increase confidence in COVID-19 vaccines and reinforce basic prevention measures.” The government program also seeks to enlist minors (16 and older). The site reports “over 4,000 organizations and almost 10,000 individuals across the United States have joined the COVID-19 Community Corps. They’ve committed to take action to encourage their families, friends, and members of their communities to get vaccinated for COVID-19.” == ---|--- | | | | | The U.S. government continues funding a costly initiative established by former President Barack Obama to offer foreigners free English, history, and civics courses as well as naturalization legal services. The money flows through U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), the Homeland Security agency with a staff of around 19,000 that oversees lawful immigration. Launched in 2009, the program aims to expand citizenship preparation services nationwide by annually awarding thousands of dollars to a multitude of leftist groups described by the government as “immigrant-serving organizations” in dozens of states and the District of Columbia. ---|--- | | | | = | = As FBI Special Counsel John Durham’s recent indictment of Clinton lawyer Michael Sussmann shows, the investigation into Crossfire Hurricane is far from over. “Michael Sussmann, who had been a lawyer for the firm behind the Steele dossier ... had a special meeting shortly before the election in 2016 with the General Counsel of the FBI, General Counsel Baker, in which they discussed targeting Trump,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton states in the Weekly Update. Sussmann, Fitton notes, “was behind the idea that a Russian bank had improper communications ... with the Trump organization.” However, “he was not indicted for lying about that specifically,” Fitton explains, “he lied about the purpose of the meeting.” According to the indictment, “he withheld from [General Counsel] Baker ... that he was there on behalf of Hillary Clinton, the Clinton campaign, the Democratic National Committee, etc..” = ---|--- | | | Fox News The judge in the case of recently indicted Democratic lawyer Michael Sussmann is married to the lawyer who represented a disgraced former FBI official that worked on the Donald Trump-Russia probe that Sussmann played some role in advancing. U.S. District Judge Christopher Cooper of the District of Columbia, who is presiding over the Sussmann case, is married to lawyer Amy Jeffress, who represented FBI lawyer Lisa Page in a civil case. == Fox News Recently released documents from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR) reveal incidents of physical and sexual abuse of unaccompanied migrant children intercepted at the southern border. == == The Daily Caller The agency’s response follows the release of documentation obtained by Judicial Watch showing that the FDA procured fetal organs, tissue, and heads for research that involved “humanized mice.” Previous documents uncovered by Judicial Watch found that the FDA requested “fresh and never frozen” fetal organs. “I’ve been doing this for 23 years. These documents we’ve gotten from the FDA and our other lawsuit...they are the worst things I’ve ever seen,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton told the Daily Caller News Foundation Friday. “The most troubling documents I’ve ever seen.” == = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

Donald J. Trump October 4th, 2021
"Until recently, US auto companies sourced nearly all of their batteries overseas. USMCA changed that. Under the agreement, an automobile cannot qualify for duty free treatment unless 40 percent of the content (45 for a truck) is manufactured by workers earning at least $16 per hour. Advanced batteries of the kind that will power new energy vehicles comprise such a high percentage of the value of these vehicles that it will be almost impossible for auto companies to qualify them under the agreement without sourcing the batteries in the United States. And in order to take advantage of a longer transition time available under the agreement, most auto companies have committed to qualifying their entire North American fleet—regardless of where the vehicles are manufactured and traded.

The result we are seeing is a Renaissance in US battery production. SK Innovations announced a $2.6 billion new facility in Georgia that will open later this year. And just yesterday SK and Ford announced an $11 billion investment in Tennessee and Kentucky. Without USMCA—and the Trump Administration’s strong actions to push back against China’s unfair trade practices—this new investment and the thousands of good paying jobs that go with it would have gone to China or other low wage jurisdictions. Worker-focused trade policy works for America. More of America’s cars of the future will be built right here."

**SURVEY REQUEST:** It’s obvious: Democrats can no longer hide the fact they’re embracing socialism. **[Would you please spare a moment of your time to take our survey on socialism in America today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=361194ee1e5a413fbb7b1780d9d51cd1&_e=SUvNFvh3L2X9DBgTTji9_pEmK93_tVndLZvReMMyFT2NxiqOMfDWIg4RM1_xe757uiWjJfLSC2Py09vvhJJsvu7BsQlFjnbAcYTLmzIfseHUA8ik1Nqa7DmO9_UtL_LaFoo4zWoYzi9SQnOai4oNxh6WnBzgk-0XnzhdTCBILT5H1hRQbuedMs6dg1tWSSyWmfVcgYq67jkLPFQQQvMY39f-tgLv-PJx0WpXOjmtvhdHQPLNGwwSJgLJ8S1D5n5Tq-obiIaaWKA7DG0L9ghJkGoqbMUez7N3iQnRpxZgey-wp-6LvIR_1adm7D6hUoFpi9KWlKZbgGC7tf30pYp7Tgpcz0LJfoF4ox40MrNcUfzlPR9zgKZDoV3HCZq6PLaws1dd3WrMiTDT-hhEykx1cD90nzv7p6wkKp8wPz1tDuB7SBo9IhGCPv_r2LYM_CN729jMLtPyFe8TJse_2K_zfhixpx64AaHNbumPCP33h90%3D)**

Fellow patriot,

We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re getting**_we’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are_**.

We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,**a façade for socialism**. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. The truth of the matter is that he goes along to get along – and that means bending to the will of what’s popular in the Democrat Party at any given moment.

**[Do you have a few moments today to take our Socialism in America Survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology the far-left Democrats are attempting to force on all of us?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=361194ee1e5a413fbb7b1780d9d51cd1&_e=SUvNFvh3L2X9DBgTTji9_pEmK93_tVndLZvReMMyFT2NxiqOMfDWIg4RM1_xe757uiWjJfLSC2Py09vvhJJsvu7BsQlFjnbAcYTLmzIfseHUA8ik1Nqa7DmO9_UtL_LaFoo4zWoYzi9SQnOai4oNxh6WnBzgk-0XnzhdTCBILT5H1hRQbuedMs6dg1tWSSyWmfVcgYq67jkLPFQQQvMY39f-tgLv-PJx0WpXOjmtvhdHQPLNGwwSJgLJ8S1D5n5Tq-obiIaaWKA7DG0L9ghJkLUfn5qoMy57pOtoi_8XSwyVJuZnKIyme3b41iOKE69pdJy6yX3da2i0H6FpQp5eSGLjOEZmq7EGGAiYQ5yZo7LuKtsj6qgTCQ9c10pqe-0n2Yx4ff_LSE7qZ05a6Ec1mmuYxGpGk7b-6h2IJj6DdBHLH-4rNbzn1Z3KkiziU0G4iRmvbPULEVvc12zprdo2MfLMtE8SI8jOZ7jRWPe3QWA%3D)**

Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the White House and Senate Democrats deem “human infrastructure.”

The reality of the situation, however, is that Chuck Schumer knows that if he doesn’t at least try to bring European style socialism to the United States, **AOC is going to launch a campaign for his Senate seat**.

**As for Biden, he made a deal with the Devil the day he accepted Bernie Sanders’ endorsement**.

President Biden claims that his $3.5 Trillion “Build Back Better” bill is “overwhelmingly popular” with the American people. We want to know if that’s true.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=361194ee1e5a413fbb7b1780d9d51cd1&_e=SUvNFvh3L2X9DBgTTji9_pEmK93_tVndLZvReMMyFT2NxiqOMfDWIg4RM1_xe757uiWjJfLSC2Py09vvhJJsvu7BsQlFjnbAcYTLmzIfseHUA8ik1Nqa7DmO9_UtL_LaFoo4zWoYzi9SQnOai4oNxh6WnBzgk-0XnzhdTCBILT5H1hRQbuedMs6dg1tWSSyWmfVcgYq67jkLPFQQQvMY39f-tgLv-PJx0WpXOjmtvhdHQPLNGwwSJgLJ8S1D5n5Tq-obiIaaWKA7DG0L9ghJkIOjSu84vE2RvwRA9tZ5DS7C8aYK7qVM5pl7g0sPjgMiiaXN4KLxkQeXtc6Igh8Q_j9eWdUpOnB0rA2Rj1ziz03qDIa2qdBBGeVmAJG0yit5qVi7M6C27UwNp2q_q15QJkrhcWSHMioD0vLv_aFH00CQCLVKWSaKqjL9rNAXO31y_zWIeYZboFVBvt_hax4ZmgspRemEJR62mVVLOBLtjU0%3D)

Please don’t ignore this email – there is too much at stake to delete this without responding.

**We warned you and every American that we could reach during last year’s election that there would be extreme consequences if we all didn’t do our part to keep the White House and the Senate Republican.**

_**Well, the roosters are coming home to roost**_.

We’re quite literally staring down the prospect of living in a socialist nation. If we don’t wake up from our slumber soon, America as we know it is going to be gone forever.

**[Please take 30 seconds out of your day to answer our 5 questions survey right now. It’s critical we know where you stand.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=361194ee1e5a413fbb7b1780d9d51cd1&_e=SUvNFvh3L2X9DBgTTji9_pEmK93_tVndLZvReMMyFT2NxiqOMfDWIg4RM1_xe757uiWjJfLSC2Py09vvhJJsvu7BsQlFjnbAcYTLmzIfseHUA8ik1Nqa7DmO9_UtL_LaFoo4zWoYzi9SQnOai4oNxh6WnBzgk-0XnzhdTCBILT5H1hRQbuedMs6dg1tWSSyWmfVcgYq67jkLPFQQQvMY39f-tgLv-PJx0WpXOjmtvhdHQPLNGwwSJgLJ8S1D5n5Tq-obiIaaWKA7DG0L9ghJkCSilM4GJo1tclUWvT-qnI-K8nuOcovuB2rmtml8yOOtMnz_-VtiDAJAGobi1gDf_ZVwH1_TCHEWVtWWjRfu2BqUwCPVRZ8VbLrcUuBDEm72hSQ16l_FX7GAQRnndrlsqqIWuTDTr1NLQUvnyum4QHNYmkkKWESrK1K55SwG3lNu65nIKbYjIe_gXdjr6KtPeFzu8Inx97f9Ry_UigbJ9Mg%3D) **

Senate Republicans **Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too.**

Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=361194ee1e5a413fbb7b1780d9d51cd1&_e=SUvNFvh3L2X9DBgTTji9_pEmK93_tVndLZvReMMyFT2NxiqOMfDWIg4RM1_xe757uiWjJfLSC2Py09vvhJJsvu7BsQlFjnbAcYTLmzIfseHUA8ik1Nqa7DmO9_UtL_LaFoo4zWoYzi9SQnOai4oNxh6WnBzgk-0XnzhdTCBILT5H1hRQbuedMs6dg1tWSSyWmfVcgYq67jkLPFQQQvMY39f-tgLv-PJx0WpXOjmtvhdHQPLNGwwSJgLJ8S1D5n5Tq-obiIaaWKA7DG0L9ghJkP5tyo5SkzmSntMnEa8E96YmHCjD5_whMlL8cIMbZPIDCSpyBFNj5Gv2c0LTDhyUbZHGzYVjTl7Qmn37HjAZbP4Irmi5yRdVmXwCT0agm9_j5X5m5QdDQAseJurqAxhOzNdA9dC3UM5IrTOAka5DlQeot6M_p1vei4GNenA7NRLTcq4jzmxWpD6AssYCkG3BBEIfAypASmNUluzkKfVZHjY%3D)

clean_body: better than I thought | | | = | | Derek, after Terry’s first email today flopped, I was starting to get worried. But, holy cow, I just checked ActBlue, and now things are really humming. We’ve almost raised $150,000 in the first day of our $500,000 three day goal push. It’s a huge start, and I am grateful for everyone who’s stepped up to make day one so strong. But we’ve got to keep the momentum going — Glenn Youngkin has endless resources at his disposal to get out the vote in these final days of the campaign. Polls are tied, and all we have is you to help us pull ahead. Derek, we’re really counting on you to step up right now. = | = Thanks, Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Terry McAuliffe Date: Mon, Oct 4, 2021 at 8:19 PM Subject: Is anyone even reading this? To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Look, Derek, I know hitting a $500,000 goal in three days is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I just asked my team if anyone even reads these emails. If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump 4 times. They’ll also know that The Cook Political Report recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.” Not to mention experts from POLITICO to The Washington Post are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win. Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, we have to start kicking this thing into high gear. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Charles Graham
subject: Thanks for joining our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
Thanks for signing up to join our campaign. Because of your support, we're building a grassroots movement in rural North Carolina.

| | |
---
| |
---
|

Thanks for signing up to join my campaign. We're happy to have you on the team. I hope you're looking forward to the campaign trail as much as I am. It's going to be tough, and it's going to take a lot of time and money, but I believe in what we can do together.
---
| [Chip in $15 now >>](http://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/LcmTwlY-DXWp2-gX7CER2g~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjPg2tP0UgM2I2MzEwZTMyMDE0ZjUzMjg3YWFmMzg2N2I2YWU0YzFENGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9jaGFybGVzZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3NXBXNwY2V1QgphW62IW2E06bCnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAcJg~~ "Chip in $15 now >>")
---
Back in July at the Lumbee Homecoming in Pembroke, NC, a supporter told me my campaign slogan should be "When Charles Graham Goes to Congress, Everybody Goes." She told me that because, although she's a Republican voter and active Christian, she knows I take everyone's concerns seriously as a State Representative. She told me that she knows when I'm elected to Congress that it's not just me going to Washington, it's all of rural North Carolina.

I grew up in a poor, farming community. The community was (and still is) a third white, a third black, and a third Lumbee Indian. I still can't stand to eat cucumbers because of how many I had to pick as a kid. My childhood and adolescence shaped the priorities I have today.

I started teaching special needs children in the 1970's, when disabled children had almost no rights in our schools. I spent 30 years working in the system to recognize their humanity. Now, I own a business that helps those same folks live independently as adults. And as a legislator, I vote my conscience and prioritize helping my district and rural communities struggling the most.

Today, I believe we have new challenges - our areas face the highest unemployment rates in the country, and our veterans are returning from war seeking opportunities - and Congress just isn't doing enough.

I'm running for Congress to answer the call. I'm running for Congress to take everyone's voice to Washington. It's a competitive district, and we're not leaving anything on the field. [We need your help to sustain our grassroots campaign. Can you chip in 15, 25 or 100 today?](http://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/n5FrL1Wu7HfcMXq235ohGA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjPg2tP0UgMGEwMTIwYWI1Y2NlNzk1YzVkNmIwMjU0MzJlZDc0MGZEKmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9ncmFoYW1uY1cFc3BjZXVCCmFbrYhbYTTpsKdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAABwm)

Our campaign has a plan in place to hold Bishop and Congressional Republicans accountable for their actions. Charles Graham has demonstrated in the State Legislature his commitment to combating dangerous rhetoric and supporting his constituents in rural North Carolina.

**The vaccine mandate is the biggest overreach by the federal government that I have EVER seen.

This is completely unconstitutional.**

**I first pressed Dr. Fauci on the need to fast-track therapeutic drugs in May of 2020.**

They refuse to talk about this. So we must hold the **RADICAL LEFT** accountable and **FIGHT** for our freedoms!

**At the end of the day, the Left isn’t “following the science” -- they’re playing politics and bending over backward to please Left-wing special interest groups.**

You know it as well as I do.

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: We've been working nonstop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Powered by People volunteers have been working nonstop lately to protect
and expand our democracy.

From Laredo to Austin, our volunteers are showing up everywhere — college
campuses, farmers markets, and even on their neighbor's doorstop — to
register new voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1001&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Two Powered by People volunteers sitting at a table registering new
vot4ers.

In honor of National Voter Registration Day, our amazing ambassadors
registered OVER 1,000 new Texas voters — and even made the news!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1002&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Goal to register 2,022 new voters ahead of 2022

We're showing up now, with over a year until the 2022 election, because
the fight for our rights can't afford to take a break.

That's why Beto and Powered by People volunteers marched in the Women's
Marches that took place over the weekend. With reproductive freedoms under
the most extreme attack since Roe v. Wade, it's on us to register new
Texas voters to help elect officials who will stand up for abortion
rights.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1003&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Seven Powered by People volunteers at a rally for abortion access.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1004&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Powered by People is working to protect the rights of all Texans and
build an inclusive democracy. Will you make a $3 or more
donation today to support Powered by People's work to register new voters,
flip Texas blue, and elect leaders who care about Texans?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&amount=3&t=1023&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Contribute $3

It's
plain and simple: Texas Republicans are trying to take away Texans'
rights. They have passed extraordinarily restrictive abortion and voter
suppression laws — all while ignoring the current COVID-19 crisis and our
power grid.

It's going to take each and every one of us to put an end to this chaos
and cruelty and elect pro-choice, pro-democracy leaders in 2022. Beto and
Powered by People volunteers are doing the work now to register new voters
and organize our communities so we can make the change we want to see in
Texas!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1024&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]We're going to fight for our democracy with everything we've got. If
you're ready to be a part of this movement, will you make a donation of
$3 or more right now?

Thank you for your support,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46984?refcode=ema20211004-156731&t=1025&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4 ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=156731%2E444211%2Ed3MoD4

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

**SURVEY REQUEST:** It’s obvious: Democrats can no longer hide the fact they’re embracing socialism. **[Would you please spare a moment of your time to take our survey on socialism in America today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b62a5cd8e860468a8962c259c33e761a&_e=vbkjF1pjSHYtBuD_q2JM3wg3ktgs-KfQAllDk1JsHR_g_HtqTxVKrBGiibyXWGgmc04iQ8oyKO4mRN_0B5BdgmfFLGRyjEk0-qocsol9uuC78GlmrCYzd1s9qoN22tMKDVlZT5gpCEmpPULxKZO-RMKmjFduCcrVlbZXtkvDlvMADbX_MTOQl5mH2diIn8sD7P4_4GjUE9ef4k7Q-BI7Fgq_3QJLA9cmD7G2Uo1GRl9PBfUDdWpC5U637gNLP02oNIppJ-LHyK5sHrX9QYHK-cWoMqVJ1Gf0JggHo73ox4hO0yAEaRM4p5JajncODn2t0gaD3Q1DdKFQhF_jVtQ8fARN6P1bROnpG4iUbnP7ecIJ6T_tUn-tfn-1kHTW-Uh2HSuPF9p-aQ8VobpUHwVnPpTz9chNr7pT_sgnIYegA5W1kP3Q0fwegj9zi5Sbaq7pPIgOKjklgcFFHSDaviO9lVOcGqJ_EqmQZlc5sdRnTQGjjYKmyB0DLdYj2Ongy5Hq)**

Fellow patriot,

We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re getting**_we’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are_**.

We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,**a façade for socialism**. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. The truth of the matter is that he goes along to get along – and that means bending to the will of what’s popular in the Democrat Party at any given moment.

**[Do you have a few moments today to take our Socialism in America Survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology the far-left Democrats are attempting to force on all of us?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b62a5cd8e860468a8962c259c33e761a&_e=vbkjF1pjSHYtBuD_q2JM3wg3ktgs-KfQAllDk1JsHR_g_HtqTxVKrBGiibyXWGgmc04iQ8oyKO4mRN_0B5BdgmfFLGRyjEk0-qocsol9uuC78GlmrCYzd1s9qoN22tMKDVlZT5gpCEmpPULxKZO-RMKmjFduCcrVlbZXtkvDlvMADbX_MTOQl5mH2diIn8sD7P4_4GjUE9ef4k7Q-BI7Fgq_3QJLA9cmD7G2Uo1GRl9PBfUDdWpC5U637gNLP02oNIppJ-LHyK5sHrX9QYHK-cWoMqVJ1Gf0JggHo73ox4gChN7GLhnCDL6gUVBc62wHP3xBk3hO2fkX69hYlqM0ImOI1YC6WEet_e7q5SpmBrdigTgD_sCHPYiGyyFmNhkrdzdYTy_-d9FeqY6yfKPX5lk6FLeUTdrt1i7M9Iu5xRKpaVfSTO4Z47K1crGtfvYNjz0qDfnI6QH_7VQfoTLMd4VrvggGsI5KcuA2xh1sU5TmfuI0HhIVIkdg32VITxCm)**

Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the White House and Senate Democrats deem “human infrastructure.”

The reality of the situation, however, is that Chuck Schumer knows that if he doesn’t at least try to bring European style socialism to the United States, **AOC is going to launch a campaign for his Senate seat**.

**As for Biden, he made a deal with the Devil the day he accepted Bernie Sanders’ endorsement**.

President Biden claims that his $3.5 Trillion “Build Back Better” bill is “overwhelmingly popular” with the American people. We want to know if that’s true.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY TODAY**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b62a5cd8e860468a8962c259c33e761a&_e=vbkjF1pjSHYtBuD_q2JM3wg3ktgs-KfQAllDk1JsHR_g_HtqTxVKrBGiibyXWGgmc04iQ8oyKO4mRN_0B5BdgmfFLGRyjEk0-qocsol9uuC78GlmrCYzd1s9qoN22tMKDVlZT5gpCEmpPULxKZO-RMKmjFduCcrVlbZXtkvDlvMADbX_MTOQl5mH2diIn8sD7P4_4GjUE9ef4k7Q-BI7Fgq_3QJLA9cmD7G2Uo1GRl9PBfUDdWpC5U637gNLP02oNIppJ-LHyK5sHrX9QYHK-cWoMqVJ1Gf0JggHo73ox4hmG60sZVM4JnrVJ5Tt6X5hCyc2FqbF5XkOEdQMOym3BncByKX6aSgV03isZ29HoyN55eKooGnB-nJ8N-bfDKQSH3VNncylM_dBvoXHFiO3i7C2Tc3W3cz4SY4BmwJ4MYPW9C1cb_SFkzVei_ewrQNAuAXgCNoD-zYOVgThVfiZvmiHNARy5lDyHpwMMuGf1GaiQmqYghivN8u5GZ0a0_v1)

Please don’t ignore this email – there is too much at stake to delete this without responding.

**We warned you and every American that we could reach during last year’s election that there would be extreme consequences if we all didn’t do our part to keep the White House and the Senate Republican.**

_**Well, the roosters are coming home to roost**_.

We’re quite literally staring down the prospect of living in a socialist nation. If we don’t wake up from our slumber soon, America as we know it is going to be gone forever.

**[Please take 30 seconds out of your day to answer our 5 questions survey right now. It’s critical we know where you stand.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b62a5cd8e860468a8962c259c33e761a&_e=vbkjF1pjSHYtBuD_q2JM3wg3ktgs-KfQAllDk1JsHR_g_HtqTxVKrBGiibyXWGgmc04iQ8oyKO4mRN_0B5BdgmfFLGRyjEk0-qocsol9uuC78GlmrCYzd1s9qoN22tMKDVlZT5gpCEmpPULxKZO-RMKmjFduCcrVlbZXtkvDlvMADbX_MTOQl5mH2diIn8sD7P4_4GjUE9ef4k7Q-BI7Fgq_3QJLA9cmD7G2Uo1GRl9PBfUDdWpC5U637gNLP02oNIppJ-LHyK5sHrX9QYHK-cWoMqVJ1Gf0JggHo73ox4iZa_L-6UwKJMzalDsoIAz3CabnSrtkTKocMTgidHIMlPQWB1egWQUar5QfcLxtToXY9Chg_G4OXC5a1fFNZvNUUjjvwVxXRCV_QLzT7RRtAVNyfDCAkkRH1xGMmp2RFoA1Dcp9e-IvYQzKbiVjl55chiMTUZQTakxkesPh9JJKuItmZwl3NR3nVBWUDNm3UCbdS8S3WMnirCpuVXtC4azA) **

Senate Republicans **Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too.**

Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b62a5cd8e860468a8962c259c33e761a&_e=vbkjF1pjSHYtBuD_q2JM3wg3ktgs-KfQAllDk1JsHR_g_HtqTxVKrBGiibyXWGgmc04iQ8oyKO4mRN_0B5BdgmfFLGRyjEk0-qocsol9uuC78GlmrCYzd1s9qoN22tMKDVlZT5gpCEmpPULxKZO-RMKmjFduCcrVlbZXtkvDlvMADbX_MTOQl5mH2diIn8sD7P4_4GjUE9ef4k7Q-BI7Fgq_3QJLA9cmD7G2Uo1GRl9PBfUDdWpC5U637gNLP02oNIppJ-LHyK5sHrX9QYHK-cWoMqVJ1Gf0JggHo73ox4jNgmBhKoDosMn1sL399zShDiWBQZP1CrfUSa7GUo-3oUjDrvnyZ9dah7UWZ23-vp8B_H8BrTdw2ta24shYPr_w9ntH5RHgnqja2JUuFFFdceKJ0c-1JjohwMrjRwJqvSAYd2RkkrsKQsxCLR3oP5NGK0-KVh5QpuYUz_d2N-mWAAhrVfoUQjuZ4Yek_3wjNj3RABu4sBa55HlI61O6N3bY)

Thanks,
Senate Republicans
